title: Memorization In Stable Diffusion Is Unexpectedly Driven by CLIP Embeddings
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026 Findings. Code is available at https://github.com/quasar529/sd-clip-mem
summary: Understanding how textual embeddings contribute to memorization in text-to-image diffusion models is crucial for both interpretability and safety. This paper investigates an unexpected behavior of CLIP embeddings in Stable Diffusion, revealing that the model disproportionately relies on specific embeddings. We categorize input tokens as <startoftext>, <prompt>, <endoftext> and <pad> with corresponding embeddings $\mathbf{v}^{\mathbf{sot}}, \mathbf{v}^{\mathbf{pr}}, \mathbf{v}^{\mathbf{eot}}, \mathbf{v}^{\mathbf{pad}}$. We discover that $\mathbf{v}^{\mathbf{pr}}$ contribute minimally to generation in memorized cases. In contrast, $\mathbf{v}^{\mathbf{pad}}$ strongly affect memorization due to their structural duplication of $\mathbf{v}^{\mathbf{eot}}$, the only embedding explicitly optimized during CLIP training. This duplication unintentionally amplifies the influence of $\mathbf{v}^{\mathbf{eot}}$, causing the model to over-rely on it, thereby driving memorization. Based on these observations, we propose two simple yet effective inference-time mitigation strategies: (1) Replacing the tokenizer's default <pad> from <eot> to the ! token before embedding, and masking the $\mathbf{v}^{\mathbf{eot}}$; (2) Partial masking of $\mathbf{v}^{\mathbf{pad}}$. Both suppress memorization without degrading quality, and are readily deployable without prior detection.

AI.tldr: 本文研究CLIP嵌入为何导致Stable Diffusion模型的记忆化问题，发现<pad>标记复制了<eot>嵌入，导致模型过度依赖<eot>从而引发记忆化，并提出两种简单有效的推理时缓解策略。
AI.motivation: 理解文本嵌入如何促进文本到图像扩散模型中的记忆化对于可解释性和安全性至关重要，但此前人们对此机制知之甚少。
AI.method: 将输入标记分类为<sot>、<pr>、<eot>和<pad>，分析各类嵌入对生成的影响，通过比较记忆化案例与非记忆化案例来确定关键嵌入。
AI.result: 发现<pr>嵌入在记忆化案例中贡献很小，而<pad>嵌入因复制了<eot>（CLIP训练中唯一明确优化的嵌入）而强烈影响记忆化。这种无意的复制放大<eot>的影响，导致记忆化。两种缓解策略（替换<pad>为! token并屏蔽<eot>，或部分屏蔽<pad>）均可抑制记忆化且不降低生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过识别<pad>标记对<eot>嵌入的复制是记忆化的根本原因，提出简单有效的推理时缓解策略，无需先验检测即可部署。

relevance_reason: This paper studies memorization in Stable Diffusion for IMAGE generation, which is a completely different application domain from 3D Human Motion Generation. While both involve diffusion models, the paper focuses on text-to-image synthesis and understanding CLIP embeddings - not motion generation, video-to-3D extraction, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile (SMPL, skeleton-based representation, multi-modal feature fusion). There's no relevance to computer graphics or 3D motion generation tasks.

title: Visibility Queries in Simple Polygons
summary: Given a simple polygon $P$ with $n$ vertices, we consider the problem of constructing a data structure for visibility queries: for any query point $q \in P$, compute the visibility polygon of $q$ in $P$. To obtain $O(\log n + k)$ query time, where $k$ is the size of the visibility polygon of $q$, the previous best result requires $O(n^3)$ space. In this paper, we propose a new data structure that uses $O(n^{2+ε})$ space, for any $ε> 0$, while achieving the same query time. If only $O(n^2)$ space is available, the best known result provides $O(\log^2 n + k)$ query time. We improve this to $O(\log n \log \log n + k)$ time. When restricted to $o(n^2)$ space, the only previously known approach, aside from the $O(n)$-time algorithm that computes the visibility polygon without preprocessing, is an $O(n)$-space data structure that supports $O(k \log n)$-time queries. We construct a data structure using $O(n \log n)$ space that answers visibility queries in $O(n^{1/2+ε} + k)$ time. In addition, for the special case in which $q$ lies on the boundary of $P$, we build a data structure of $O(n \log n)$ space supporting $O(\log^2 n + k)$ query time; alternatively, we achieve $O(\log n + k)$ query time using $O(n^{1+ε})$ space. To achieve our results, we propose a new method for decomposing simple polygons, which may be of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 研究简单多边形中可见性查询的数据结构构建问题。通过引入新的多边形分解方法，在不同空间限制下实现了更高效的查询时间，包含O(n^{2+ε})空间获取O(log n + k)查询时间，以及改进的边界情况处理等核心贡献。
AI.motivation: To obtain O(log n + k) query time, the previous best result requires O(n^3) space, which is space-intensive. This paper aims to reduce space complexity while maintaining efficient query time.
AI.method: We propose a new method for decomposing simple polygons, which may be of independent interest.
AI.result: For any query point q in a simple polygon P, we construct data structures achieving various trade-offs between space and query time: O(n^{2+ε}) space for O(log n + k) time, O(n^2) space for O(log n log log n + k) time, O(n log n) space for O(n^{1/2+ε} + k) time. For boundary query points: O(n log n) space for O(log^2 n + k) time or O(n^{1+ε}) space for O(log n + k) time.
AI.conclusion: We present a data structure achieving O(log n + k) query time with O(n^{2+ε}) space, improving O(n^3) space requirement. For O(n^2) space, we achieve O(log n log log n + k) query time, improving previous O(log^2 n + k). We also construct O(n log n) space data structure for O(n^{1/2+ε} + k) queries. Special case for boundary query points achieves O(log^2 n + k) with O(n log n) space or O(log n + k) with O(n^{1+ε}) space.

relevance_reason: This paper is about computational geometry - specifically visibility queries and polygon decomposition algorithms. It has no relevance to 3D human motion generation. The application domain is completely different: it's about geometric data structures for visibility queries in simple polygons, not about generating human motion from videos, diffusion models, SMPL representations, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile. This is a theoretical algorithms paper unrelated to computer graphics motion generation.

title: Reasoning-Guided Grounding: Elevating Video Anomaly Detection through Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Video Anomaly Detection (VAD) has traditionally been framed as binary classification or outlier detection, providing neither interpretable reasoning nor precise spatial localization of anomalous events. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) offer rich scene understanding, they struggle with reliable spatial grounding - often producing hallucinated or geometrically invalid bounding boxes when asked to localize objects. We propose VANGUARD (Video Anomaly Understanding through Reasoning and Grounding), a framework that unifies anomaly classification, spatial grounding, and chain-of-thought reasoning within a single VLM. VANGUARD introduces a three-stage curriculum that progressively layers training objectives: (1) classifier warmup on frozen backbone features, (2) LoRA-adapted spatial grounding, and (3) chain-of-thought generation. To overcome the sparse annotation typical of VAD benchmarks, we employ a teacher-student annotation pipeline in which a VLM (Qwen3-VL-4B) generates structured per-subclip reasoning trajectories based on manual annotations available from the UCA Dataset. Further, GroundingDINO provides bounding box supervision. On UCF-Crime, VANGUARD achieves 94% ROC-AUC with 84% F1 while simultaneously producing interpretable chain-of-thought explanations and spatial grounding of anomalous objects - capabilities absent from prior VAD methods. Ablations confirm that staged training outperforms monolithic optimization, and that structured reasoning acts as an implicit regularizer yielding more balanced predictions than classification-only fine-tuning. Zero-shot transfer to XD-Violence and ShanghaiTech demonstrates cross-domain generalization without target-domain adaptation.

AI.tldr: VANGUARD是一个统一的视频异常检测框架，通过三级课程训练整合异常分类、空间定位和思维链推理。在UCF-Crime上达到94% ROC-AUC和84% F1，并具备跨领域零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统视频异常检测方法仅做二元分类或离群点检测，缺乏可解释推理和精确空间定位。视觉语言模型虽然能理解场景，但难以可靠地进行空间定位，常产生幻觉或几何无效的边界框。
AI.method: 提出VANGUARD框架，统一异常分类、空间定位和思维链推理。采用三级课程训练：(1)冻结骨干特征进行分类器热身训练，(2)LoRA适应空间定位，(3)思维链生成。使用Qwen3-VL-4B作为教师模型生成结构化推理轨迹，GroundingDINO提供边界框监督。
AI.result: 在UCF-Crime数据集上，VANGUARD达到94% ROC-AUC和84% F1，同时生成可解释的思维链解释和异常物体空间定位。消融实验验证了三级训练优于单阶段优化，思维链推理作为隐式正则化使预测更平衡。零样本迁移到XD-Violence和ShanghaiTech证明了跨领域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: VANGUARD在UCF-Crime上达到94% ROC-AUC和84% F1，显著优于现有方法。三级课程训练比单阶段优化效果更好，思维链推理作为隐式正则化使预测更平衡。零样本迁移到XD-Violence和ShanghaiTech证明了跨领域泛化能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Video Anomaly Detection for security/surveillance (detecting crimes, accidents in videos like UCF-Crime, XD-Violence), which is COMPLETELY DIFFERENT from the Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation domain. While the paper mentions Vision-Language Models (VLM), this is used for anomaly reasoning and spatial grounding in surveillance context, not for quality control in motion generation or bridging 2D-to-3D domains. The application domain, datasets (UCF-Crime vs human motion datasets), and goals (anomaly detection vs motion generation) have zero overlap with the research profile.

title: Computing Planar Convex Hulls with a Promise
summary:
Computing the convex hull of a planar $n$-point set $P$ is one of the most fundamental problems in computational geometry. It has an $Ω(n \log n)$ lower bound in the algebraic computation tree model, and many convex hull algorithms match this bound. Classical results show that, under special input assumptions, sub-$O(n \log n)$ algorithms are possible. For instance, when the points are given in lexicographic or angular order, the convex hull can be computed in linear time. Even under the weaker assumption that the sequence of points corresponds to the ordered vertices of a simple polygonal chain, linear-time algorithms exist.
  This naturally raises the question: can the convex hull of a point set be computed in sub-$O(n \log n)$ time under weaker input assumptions? We answer this positively. Under the promise that the input sequence contains the convex hull as a subsequence, we give a deterministic $O(n \sqrt{\log n})$-time algorithm to compute the convex hull of $P$. With randomisation, we achieve expected running time $O(n \log^{\varepsilon} n)$ for any constant $\varepsilon > 0$.
  We find this surprising, as points not on the convex hull may behave adversarially toward our convex hull construction algorithm. Yet the promise that \emph{only} the hull points are sorted suffices for $o(n \log n)$-time algorithms. Finally, we show that this promise is tight: if it is even slightly broken, i.e., allowing just one hull point to appear out of order, we prove an adversarial $Ω(n \log n)$-time lower bound. Consequently, the promise cannot be verified with fewer than $Ω(n \log n)$ comparisons. This also negatively resolves an open problem of Löffler and Raichel, who conjectured sub-$O(n \log n)$-time algorithms for computing the convex hull of a supersequence containing the hull as a subsequence.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在弱输入假设下（即输入序列包含凸包作为子序列）计算平面点集凸包的问题。提出了确定性O(n√log n)算法和随机化O(n log^ε n)算法，并证明了该承诺的紧性下界。
AI.motivation: 经典结果显示在特殊输入假设（ lexicographic order、angular order、simple polygonal chain）下可达到线性时间或亚线性时间。本文探索在更弱的输入假设下——仅承诺输入序列包含凸包点作为子序列——是否能突破Ω(n log n)下界，从而回答Löffler和Raichel提出的开放问题。
AI.method: 1. 利用"仅 Hull 点已排序"的承诺设计算法框架；2. 确定性算法采用分治策略与√log n因子权衡；3. 随机化算法通过随机采样和概率分析优化至 O(n log^ε n)；4. 通过构造_adversarial_输入实例证明下界：允许一个 Hull 点乱序即导致 Ω(n log n) 时间复杂度。
AI.result: 1. 确定性算法：O(n√log n)时间复杂度；2. 随机化算法：期望 O(n log^ε n)（对任意常数 ε>0）；3. 下界证明：若承诺被轻微违反（仅一个 Hull 点乱序），任何算法需要 Ω(n log n)时间；4. 承诺验证复杂度：验证该承诺本身需要 Ω(n log n)比较。
AI.conclusion: 本文否定了Löffler和Raichel的猜想，证明即使在非常弱的"凸包作为子序列"承诺下，仍存在亚-O(n log n)算法；但该承诺必须严格成立——任何轻微违反都会导致下界回归。意义在于揭示了"Hull 点排序"这一极弱条件对于突破经典下界的关键作用。

relevance_reason: This paper is about computing planar convex hulls in computational geometry - completely unrelated to 3D human motion generation. The application domain is entirely different (computational geometry algorithms vs. computer graphics/human motion generation). There is no match in methods or application domain.

title: Approaching human parity in the quality of automated organoid image segmentation
summary:
Organoids are complex, three dimensional, self-organizing cell cultures which manifest organ-like features and represent a powerful platform for studying human disease and developing treatment options. Organoid development is characterized by dynamic morphological and cellular organization, which mimic some aspects of organ development. To study these rapid changes over the course of organoid development, advanced imaging and analytical tools are critical to accurately monitor the trajectory of organoid growth and investigate disease processes.
  In this work, we focus on computer vision and machine learning techniques to automatically measure the size and shape of developing spheroids derived from pluripotent stem cells (iPSCs), which are typically the starting material for generating organoid cultures. To facilitate this task, we introduce a composite method that combines the Segment Anything Model (SAM), a general-purpose foundation model, with an existing domain-specific tool. This composite method is evaluated together with several existing tools by testing them on organoid image data and comparing with the results of manual image segmentation. We find that no single existing tool is able to segment the test images with sufficient accuracy across all test conditions, but the newly introduced composite method produces consistent and accurate results for all but a very small fraction of the most challenging images. Finally, we compare the accuracy of this method to the variability between manual segmentations by independent annotators (inter-observer variability) and find that by one measure it performs at the level of inter-observer variability and by others it performs very close to it.

AI.tldr: 本研究聚焦于类器官（organoids）的三维细胞培养技术，提出了一种结合分段任意模型（SAM）与领域专用工具的复合方法，用于自动测量由多能干细胞衍生的 spheroids 的大小和形状。该方法在类器官图像数据上进行测试，并与人工分割结果进行比较。
AI.motivation: 类器官开发过程具有动态形态和细胞组织变化，需要先进成像和分析工具来准确监测类器官生长轨迹和研究疾病过程。现有工具无法在所有测试条件下达到足够精度，因此需要开发更准确的自动分割方法。
AI.method: 引入复合方法，将分段任意模型（SAM，一种通用基础模型）与现有领域专用工具相结合，并在类器官图像数据上评估该方法与多种现有工具的性能差异。
AI.result: 单一现有工具无法在所有测试条件下达到足够精度，但新引入的复合方法除少数最具挑战性的图像外，在所有图像上产生一致准确的结果。该方法在一个指标上达到观察者间变异的水平，在其他指标上非常接近观察者间变异。
AI.conclusion: 复合方法（SAM+领域专用工具）是类器官图像分割的有效工具，其精度接近人工标注者之间的一致性水平。

relevance_reason: The paper is about organoid (3D cell culture) image segmentation in the biomedical domain. This is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. While it uses image segmentation methods (SAM), this is for analyzing cell cultures, not for generating human motion. The application domain is biomedical imaging, not computer graphics, and the methods are unrelated to diffusion-based motion generation, SMPL-based representation, video generation models, or any of the methods specified in the research profile.

title: Computing Thiele Rules on Interval Elections and their Generalizations
summary:
Approval-based committee voting has received significant attention in the social choice community. Among the studied rules, Thiele rules, and especially Proportional Approval Voting (PAV), stand out for desirable properties such as proportional representation, Pareto optimality, and support monotonicity. Their main drawback is that computing a Thiele outcome is NP-hard in general.
  A glimpse of hope comes from the fact that Thiele rules are better behaved under structured preferences. On the candidate interval (CI) domain, they are computable in polynomial time via a linear program (LP) that has a totally unimodular constraint matrix. Surprisingly, this approach fails for the related voter interval (VI) domain, and the complexity of the problem has repeatedly been posed as an open question. Our main result resolves this question: although the relevant matrix is not totally unimodular, the ``standard'' LP still admits at least one optimal integral solution, and we provide a fast algorithm for finding it.
  Our technique naturally extends to the voter-candidate interval (VCI) domain, also known as the 1-dimensional voter-candidate range (1D-VCR) domain, and to the linearly consistent (LC) domain, both of which generalize the candidate and voter interval domains. Although both the VCI and LC domains have been studied in social choice, their relationship was unknown. We show, through connections to graph theory, that LC strictly contains VCI. We also provide an alternative definition of LC that is closer in spirit to VCI and has a natural interpretation in approval elections; this equivalence may be of independent interest. Finally, we study an alternative tree-based generalization of VCI and show that Thiele rules become NP-hard to compute on this domain.

AI.tldr: 研究解决了Thiele规则在voter interval域上的计算复杂度开放问题，证明标准线性规划虽矩阵非完全单模但仍保最优整数解，并扩展到VCI和LC域，证明其包含关系，同时发现在树形推广下Thiele规则变为NP-hard。
AI.motivation: Thiele规则（特别是PAV）在一般情况下计算是NP-hard的，但在候选区间(CI)域上可通过线性规划多项式时间求解。研究者曾猜测 voter interval (VI) 域也可同样处理，但这一点长期未被证明，成为开放问题。
AI.method: 通过分析相关矩阵的非完全单模性，尽管标准线性规划的约束矩阵不是完全单模的，但仍存在最优整数解，并设计了快速算法求解。此外，通过图论连接建立VCI与LC域的关系。
AI.result: 解决了VI域的计算复杂度问题：标准LP仍存在最优整数解。证明了LC域严格包含VCI域。进一步发现树形推广下Thiele规则变为NP-hard。
AI.conclusion: 完全解决了VI域的计算复杂度问题，并将结果推广到VCI和LC域，同时揭示了树形推广下Thiele规则的计算困难性，为approval voting的理论和算法研究做出重要贡献。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Computational Social Choice / Voting Theory (Thiele rules for elections), not Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. The methods (linear programming for voting systems) and application domain are completely disconnected. Even though linear programming is mentioned, it's used for election computations, not motion generation. This has zero relevance to the research profile.

title: Learning to Segment using Summary Statistics and Weak Supervision
summary: Medical experts often manually segment images to obtain diagnostic statistics and discard the resulting annotations. We aim to train segmentation models to alleviate this burden, but constrained to the retained summary statistics (e.g., the area of the annotated region). Empirical results suggest that statistics alone are insufficient for this task, but adding weak information in the form of a few pixels within the area of interest significantly improves performance. We use a novel loss function that combines terms for image reconstruction quality, matching to summary statistics, and overlap between the predicted foreground and the weak supervisory signal. Experiments on standard image, ultrasound (breast cancer), and Computed Tomography (CT) scan (kidney tumors) data demonstrate the utility and potential of the approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督医学图像分割方法，仅利用摘要统计信息（如标注区域面积）训练分割模型，并结合少量像素的弱监督信号来提高分割性能。提出一种结合图像重建质量、统计信息匹配和前景重叠的新型损失函数，在超声（乳腺癌）和CT（肾脏肿瘤）数据上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 医学专家通常手动分割图像以获取诊断统计信息，但只保留统计结果而丢弃标注数据。本文旨在训练分割模型来减轻这一负担，但仅使用保留的摘要统计信息（如区域面积），探索仅凭统计信息能否训练有效的分割模型。
AI.method: 提出一种新型损失函数，包含三个部分：1）图像重建质量项；2）摘要统计信息匹配项（使预测区域的统计值匹配保留的统计信息）；3）弱监督信号重叠项（利用少量像素标注作为弱监督）。在标准图像、超声（乳腺癌）和CT（肾脏肿瘤）数据集上进行了实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅使用统计信息的监督效果有限，但添加少量像素的弱监督信号后，分割性能显著提升。该方法在乳腺癌超声图像和肾脏肿瘤CT扫描数据上均表现出良好的实用性和潜力。
AI.conclusion: 仅依靠摘要统计信息训练分割模型存在困难，但结合少量像素的弱监督信号可有效解决这一问题。该方法为医学图像分割中的弱监督学习提供了新的思路，具有減少专家标注负担的临床应用前景。

It has nothing to do with computer graphics, 3D human motion generation, video generation models, VLM-based quality control, diffusion for motion generation, or SMPL/skeleton-based motion representations. The application domain is completely different - medical imaging vs 3D motion generation.

title: Making the Invisible Visible: Understanding the Mismatch Between Organizational Goals and Worker Experiences in AI Adoption
summary: While AI is often introduced into organizations to drive innovation and efficiency, many adoption efforts fail as workers resist and struggle to integrate these systems. These failures point to a deeper issue: workers, the very people expected to collaborate with AI, are often invisible in decisions about how AI is designed and used. Drawing on interviews with professionals who interact with AI systems daily in healthcare, finance, and management, we examine the disconnect between organizational expectations and worker experiences. We identify key barriers, including poor usability and interoperability, misaligned expectations, limited control, and insufficient communication. These challenges highlight a gap between how organizations implement AI and the evolving worker needs, tasks, and workflows that it fails to support. We argue that successful adoption requires recognizing workers as central to AI integration and propose adaptation strategies at the individual, task, and organizational levels to better align AI systems with real-world practices.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了组织中AI采用失败的现象，研究表明员工在AI设计和使用决策中常被忽视，导致整合困难。通过对医疗、金融和管理领域专业人士的访谈，识别了关键障碍，并提出在个体、任务和组织层面进行适应性调整的策略。
AI.motivation: AI技术虽被广泛引入组织以推动创新和效率，但许多采用努力以失败告终，员工抵制并难以整合这些系统。这反映出更深层次的问题：负责与AI协作的员工在AI设计和使用的决策中往往被忽视。
AI.method: 通过对医疗、金融和管理领域每日与AI系统互动的专业人士进行访谈，收集定性数据，分析组织期望与员工体验之间的脱节，识别关键的采用障碍。

title: One Sequence to Segment Them All: Efficient Data Augmentation for CT and MRI Cross-Domain 3D Spine Segmentation
summary: Deep learning-based medical image segmentation is increasingly used to support clinical diagnosis and develop new treatment strategies. However, model performance remains limited by the scarcity of high-quality annotated data and insufficient generalization across imaging protocols. This limitation is particularly evident in MRI and CT, where models are typically trained on a single acquisition sequence and exhibit reduced robustness when applied to unseen sequences or contrasts. Although data augmentation is widely used to improve general robustness on medical images, its impact on cross-modality generalization has not been quantitatively explored. In this work, we study a targeted set of data augmentation techniques designed to improve cross-modality transfer. We train three spine segmentation models, each on a single-modality/sequence dataset, and evaluate them across seven out-of-distribution datasets (spanning CT and MRI), reflecting a realistic single-sequence training and multi-sequence/contrast/modality deployment scenario. Our results demonstrate substantial performance gains on unseen domains (average Dice gain of 155 %) while preserving in-domain accuracy (average Dice decrease of 0.008 %), including effective transfer between CT and MRI. To mitigate the computational cost typically associated with strong data augmentation, we implement GPU-optimized augmentations that maintain, and even improve, training efficiency by approximately 10 %. We release our approach as an open-source toolbox, enabling seamless integration into commonly used frameworks such as nnUNet and MONAI. These augmentations significantly enhance robustness to heterogeneous clinical imaging scenarios without compromising training speed.

AI.tldr: 本研究针对医学图像分割中跨模态泛化能力不足的问题，系统地研究了针对跨模态迁移设计的数据增强技术，通过在三组脊柱分割模型上的实验，验证了该方法能在保持原域精度的同时，显著提升跨域性能（Dice增益155%），并将训练效率提高约10%，并以开源工具箱形式发布。

AI.method: 研究了一组针对跨模态迁移设计的数据增强技术。训练三个脊柱分割模型，每个模型使用单一模态/序列数据集，然后在七个域外数据集（涵盖CT和MRI）上进行评估反映了现实的单序列训练和多序列/对比度/模态部署场景。为降低计算成本，实现了GPU优化增强。

title: Programmatic Context Augmentation for LLM-based Symbolic Regression
summary: Symbolic regression (SR), the task of discovering mathematical expressions that best describe a given dataset, remains a fundamental challenge in scientific discovery. Traditional approaches, primarily based on genetic algorithms and related evolutionary methods, have proven useful but suffer from scalability and expressivity limitations. Recently, large language model (LLM)-based evolutionary search methods have been introduced into SR and show promise. However, existing LLM-based approaches typically rely on scalar evaluation metrics, such as mean squared error, as the sole source of feedback during the search process, thereby overlooking the rich information embedded in the dataset. To address this limitation, we propose a novel LLM-based evolutionary search framework that incorporates programmatic context augmentation. By enabling code-based interactions with the dataset, our method can actively perform data analysis and extract informative signals, beyond aggregated evaluation scores. We evaluate our framework on advanced benchmarks, such as LLM-SRBench, and demonstrate superior efficiency and accuracy compared to strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的基于大型语言模型（LLM）的符号回归进化搜索框架，通过程序化上下文增强方法，使模型能够主动与数据集进行代码交互并提取信息性信号，超越了传统的仅依赖均方误差等标量指标的评估方式。在LLM-SRBench等基准测试中，该方法展现出优于现有方法的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统的符号回归方法主要基于遗传算法等进化方法，存在可扩展性和表达能力受限的问题。近年来引入的LLM方法虽然显示出潜力，但现有方法通常仅依赖标量评估指标（如均方误差）作为搜索过程中的唯一反馈来源，忽略了数据集中嵌入的丰富信息。这一局限性影响了搜索效率和准确性。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的LLM进化搜索框架，包含程序化上下文增强（programmatic context augmentation）。该方法通过代码与数据集进行交互，使模型能够主动执行数据分析并提取信息性信号，而不仅仅依赖聚合的评估分数。
AI.result: 在高级基准测试（如LLM-SRBench）上评估了该框架，并展示了优于强基线的效率和准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功证明了程序化上下文增强方法在LLM-based符号回归中的有效性，通过允许模型主动分析数据集而不仅仅是评估拟合误差，可以显著提升搜索效率和最终表达式的准确性。这一方法为科学发现中的符号回归任务提供了新的思路。

title: NucEval: A Robust Evaluation Framework for Nuclear Instance Segmentation
summary: In computational pathology, nuclear instance segmentation is a fundamental task with many downstream clinical applications. With the advent of deep learning, many approaches, including convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and vision transformers (ViTs), have been proposed for this task, along with both machine learning-based and non-machine learning-based pre- and post-processing techniques to further boost performance. However, one fundamental aspect that has received less attention is the evaluation pipeline. In this study, we identify four key issues associated with nuclear instance segmentation evaluation and propose corresponding solutions. Our proposed modifications, namely handling vague regions, score normalization, overlapping instances, and border uncertainty, are integrated into a unified framework called NucEval, which enables robust evaluation of nuclear instance segmentation. We evaluate this pipeline using the NuInsSeg dataset, which provides unique characteristics that make it particularly suitable for this study, as well as two additional external datasets, with three CNN- and ViT-based nuclear instance segmentation models, to demonstrate the impact of these modifications on instance segmentation metrics. The code, along with complete guidelines and illustrative examples, is publicly available at: https://github.com/masih4/nuc_eval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为NucEval的统一评估框架，用于解决核实例分割评估中的四个关键问题：模糊区域处理、分数归一化、重叠实例和边界不确定性。
AI.motivation: 在计算病理学中，核实例分割是一个基础任务，但评估流程受到的关注较少。作者识别出现有的评估方法存在四个关键问题：模糊区域处理、分数归一化、重叠实例和边界不确定性，这些问题会影响分割指标的准确性。

AI.result: 通过在多个数据集和多种分割模型上的实验，验证了所提出的修改方案对实例分割指标的负面影响，证明了NucEval框架的必要性。
AI.conclusion: NucEval框架能够 robustly 评估核实例分割，为计算病理学领域提供了一个标准化的评估工具，有助于推动该领域的发展。

title: Boundary-Aware Uncertainty Quantification for Wildfire Spread Prediction
summary: Reliable wildfire spread prediction is vital for risk-aware emergency planning, yet most deep learning models lack principled uncertainty quantification (UQ). Further, for boundary-sensitive cases like wildfire spread, evaluating models with global metrics alone is often insufficient. To shift the focus of UQ evaluation toward a more operationally relevant approach, the Fire-Centered Evaluation Region (FCER) framework is introduced as a spatially conditioned protocol to characterize UQ within critical fire zones. Using FCER, an Ensemble is compared against an distilled single-pass student model on the WildfireSpreadTS dataset. The student model demonstrates comparable calibration and complementary uncertainty ranking in boundary-relevant regimes. Code is available at https://github. com/jonasvilhofunk/WildfireUQ-FCER

AI.tldr: 本文针对野火蔓延预测中的不确定性量化问题，提出FCER框架来评估模型在关键火灾区域的不确定性表现，实验表明蒸馏学生模型与集成模型性能相当。
AI.motivation: 可靠的野火蔓延预测对风险感知应急规划至关重要，但大多数深度学习模型缺乏原则性的不确定性量化(UQ)；且对于边界敏感的野火蔓延案例，仅用全局metrics评估模型往往不够
AI.method: 引入Fire-Centered Evaluation Region (FCER)框架作为空间条件化协议，在关键火灾区域内表征不确定性；使用FCER比较ensemble模型与蒸馏的单程学生模型在WildfireSpreadTS数据集上的表现
AI.result: 学生模型表现出可比的校准性能和边界相关 regime 下互补的不确定性排序
AI.conclusion: FCER框架提供了一种更具操作相关性的方法来评估火灾边界区域的模型不确定性量化性能。

title: DINO Soars: DINOv3 for Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation of Remote Sensing Imagery
summary: The remote sensing (RS) domain suffers from a lack of densely labeled datasets, which are costly to obtain. Thus, models that can segment RS imagery well without supervised fine-tuning are valuable, but existing solutions fall behind supervised methods. Recently, DINOv3 surpassed SOTA RS foundation models on the GEO-bench segmentation benchmark without pre-training on RS data. Additionally, DINO.txt has enabled open vocabulary semantic segmentation (OVSS) with the DINOv3 backbone. We leverage these developments to form an OVSS model for RS imagery, free of RS-domain fine-tuning. Our model, CAFe-DINO (Cost Aggregation + Feature Upsampling with DINO) exploits the strong OVSS performance of DINOv3 for RS imagery via cost aggregation and training-free upsampling of text-image similarity scores. The robust latent of the DINOv3 backbone eliminates the need for fine-tuning on RS imagery; we instead fine-tune our model on a RS-targeted subset of COCO-Stuff. CAFe-DINO achieves state-of-the-art performance on key RS segmentation datasets, outperforming OVSS methods fine-tuned on RS data. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/rfaulk/DINO_Soars.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAFe-DINO模型，利用DINOv3和DINO.txt实现遥感图像的开放词汇语义分割(OVSS)，无需在遥感数据上进行微调。模型通过成本聚合和文本-图像相似度分数的无训练上采样，在关键遥感分割数据集上达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 遥感领域缺乏密集标注数据集，现有无需监督微调的模型性能不如监督方法。
AI.method: CAFe-DINO利用DINOv3强大特征表示，通过成本聚合(cost aggregation)和训练-free的特征上采样(text-image similarity scores upsampling)，在COCO-Stuff的遥感目标子集上微调，而非遥感图像。
AI.result: CAFe-DINO在关键遥感分割数据集上取得最先进性能，优于在遥感数据上微调的OVSS方法。
AI.conclusion: 首次将DINOv3与DINOtxt结合用于遥感开放词汇语义分割，在无遥感领域微调下实现SOTA表现。

title: Sentinel2Cap: A Human-Annotated Benchmark Dataset for Multimodal Remote Sensing Image Captioning
summary: Image captioning has become an important task in computer vision, enabling models to generate natural language descriptions of visual content. While several datasets exist for natural images and high-resolution optical remote sensing imagery, the availability of captioning datasets for multimodal satellite data remains limited, particularly for SAR imagery and medium-resolution sensors. We introduce Sentinel2Cap, a human-annotated multimodal captioning dataset containing Sentinel-1 SAR and Sentinel-2 multi-spectral image patches at 10 m and 20 m spatial resolution with diverse land cover compositions. Captions are created manually and carefully validated to ensure both semantic accuracy and linguistic quality. To evaluate Sentinel2Cap, we perform a zero-shot captioning using the Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct model across three image modalities: RGB, multi-spectral, and SAR pseudo-RGB representations. Results show that RGB images achieve the highest captioning performance, while SAR images remain more challenging for vision-language models. Providing modality-specific contextual prompts consistently improves performance across all metrics. These findings highlight both the challenges of multimodal remote sensing image captioning and the potential value of human-annotated datasets for advancing research in cross-modal scene understanding. All the material is publicly avaiable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Sentinel2Cap，一个新的人注释多模态卫星图像字幕数据集，包含Sentinel-1 SAR和Sentinel-2多光谱图像_patch，使用Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct模型进行零样本字幕生成评估。

title: Synthetic Data Generation for Long-Tail Medical Image Classification: A Case Study in Skin Lesions
summary: Long-tailed class distributions are pervasive in multi-class medical datasets and pose significant challenges for deep learning models which typically underperform on tail classes with limited samples. This limitation is particularly problematic in medical applications, where rare classes often correspond to severe or high-risk diseases and therefore require high diagnostic accuracy. Existing solutions-including specialized architectures, rebalanced loss functions, and handcrafted data augmentation-offer only marginal improvements and struggle to scale due to their limited and largely deterministic variability. To address these challenges, we introduce a diffusion-model-driven synthetic data augmentation pipeline tailored for medical long-tailed classification. Our approach features a novel inpainting diffusion model combined with an Out-of-Distribution (OOD) post-selection mechanism to ensure diverse, realistic, and clinically meaningful synthetic samples. Evaluated on the ISIC2019 skin lesion classification dataset, one of the largest and most imbalanced medical imaging benchmarks, our method yields substantial improvements in overall performance, with particularly pronounced gains on tail classes with more than $28\%$ improvement on the class with the fewest samples. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of diffusion-based augmentation in mitigating long-tail imbalance and enhancing medical classification robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的合成数据增强管道，用于解决医学长尾分类问题。通过结合修复扩散模型和分布外（OOD）后筛选机制，在ISIC2019皮肤病变分类数据集上实现了显著的性能提升，特别是在样本最少的尾类上提升了超过28%。

AI.method: 提出了一种基于扩散模型的合成数据增强管道，包含新颖的修复扩散模型和OOD后筛选机制，以确保生成多样化、真实且具有临床意义的合成样本。

AI.conclusion: 基于扩散模型的增强方法在缓解长尾不平衡和增强医学分类鲁棒性方面是有效的。

title: Evaluating Prompting and Execution-Based Methods for Deterministic Computation in LLMs
comment: 8 pages, 1 figure. Code and dataset available at https://github.com/bigbird231/llm-exact-computation-dataset
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in natural language understanding and reasoning. However, their ability to perform exact, deterministic computation remains unclear. In this work, we systematically evaluate multiple prompting strategies, including Chain-of-Thought (CoT), Least-to-Most decomposition, Program-of-Thought (PoT), and Self-Consistency (SC), on tasks requiring precise and error-free outputs, including binary counting, longest substring detection, and arithmetic evaluation. To support this study, we introduce a synthetic dataset with diverse natural language instructions, enabling controlled evaluation of exact computation across multiple task types. Our results show that standard prompting methods achieve only moderate accuracy on sequence-based tasks. CoT provides limited improvement, while Least-to-Most suffers from error accumulation. In contrast, PoT achieves perfect accuracy by generating executable code and delegating computation to an external interpreter. Self-Consistency improves robustness through majority voting, but incurs substantial computational overhead. We further train a small domain-specific model (CodeT5-small) to generate executable programs, which achieves perfect accuracy on held-out synthetic test data across all tasks with minimal training cost. Overall, our findings suggest that LLMs may simulate reasoning patterns rather than reliably perform exact symbolic computation. For deterministic tasks, combining LLMs with external tools or using specialized models provides a more reliable and efficient solution.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了多种提示策略在LLMs精确计算任务上的表现，发现思维程序（PoT）通过生成可执行代码能达到完美准确率，而传统推理方法改进有限，建议将LLMs与外部工具结合以提高可靠性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在自然语言理解和推理方面表现出色，但其执行精确、确定性计算的能力尚不明确。作者试图系统评估多种提示策略在需要精确输出的任务上的表现。
AI.method: 作者评估了四种提示策略：思维链（CoT）、最少到最多分解（Least-to-Most）、思维程序（PoT）和自一致性（SC），在二进制计数最长子字符串检测和算术评估等任务上的表现，并引入了合成数据集进行受控评估。
AI.result: 标准提示方法在序列任务上仅达到中等准确率；CoT改进有限；Least-to-Most因错误累积表现不佳；PoT通过生成可执行代码达到完美准确率；自一致性通过多数投票提高鲁棒性但计算开销较大；使用CodeT5-small领域特定模型可在合成测试数据上达到完美准确率。
AI.conclusion: LLMs可能只是模拟推理模式而非可靠地执行精确符号计算。对于确定性任务，将LLMs与外部工具结合或使用专用模型能提供更可靠高效的解决方案。

title: VEBench:Benchmarking Large Multimodal Models for Real-World Video Editing
summary: Real-world video editing demands not only expert knowledge of cinematic techniques but also multimodal reasoning to select, align, and combine footage into coherent narratives. While recent Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have shown remarkable progress in general video understanding, their abilities in multi-video reasoning and operational editing workflows remain largely unexplored. We introduce VEBENCH, the first comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate both editing knowledge understanding and operational reasoning in realistic video editing scenarios. VEBENCH contains 3.9K high-quality edited videos (over 257 hours) and 3,080 human-verified QA pairs, built through a three-round human-AI collaborative annotation pipeline that ensures precise temporal labeling and semantic consistency. It features two complementary QA tasks: 1) Video Editing Technique Recognition, assessing models' ability to identify 7 editing techniques using multimodal cues; and 2) Video Editing Operation Simulation, modeling real-world editing workflows by requiring the selection and temporal localization of relevant clips from multiple candidates. Extensive experiments across proprietary (e.g., Gemini-2.5-Pro) and open-source LMMs reveal a large gap between current model performance and human-level editing cognition. These results highlight the urgent need for bridging video understanding with creative operational reasoning. We envision VEBENCH as a foundation for advancing intelligent video editing systems and driving future research on complex reasoning.

AI.tldr: VEBENCH是首个全面评估大语言模型在真实视频编辑场景中编辑知识理解和操作推理能力的基准测试，包含3.9K高质量编辑视频（超257小时）和3080个人类验证的问答对。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的视频编辑不仅需要电影技术的专业知识，还需要多模态推理能力来选择、对齐和组合镜头。当前的大语言模型在多视频推理和操作编辑工作流程方面的能力尚未被探索，缺乏专门的评估基准。
AI.method: 通过三轮人机协作标注流程构建，包含两个互补的问答任务：1）视频编辑技术识别，评估模型使用多模态线索识别7种编辑技术的能力；2）视频编辑操作模拟，要求从多个候选镜头中选择相关片段并进行时间定位。实验覆盖了Gemini-2.5-Pro等专有模型和开源模型。
AI.result: 实验揭示了当前模型性能与人类水平编辑认知之间存在较大差距，表明需要紧急推进视频理解与创造性操作推理的结合研究。
AI.conclusion: VEBENCH作为视频编辑智能系统的基础设施，为推动复杂推理研究提供了重要平台，未来有望促进视频编辑领域的人工智能发展。

relevance_reason: This paper is about video editing evaluation benchmarks (filmEditing), NOT 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is completely different - it focuses on editing existing video content for film production, not generating 3D human motion. While it uses VLMs (similar method), the goal is video editing task assessment, not extracting 3D motion priors from video, bridging 2D-to-3D domain gap, or generating SMPL/skeleton-based motion. The pain points and application domain are entirely misaligned.

title: FACTOR: Counterfactual Training-Free Test-Time Adaptation for Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
summary: Open-vocabulary object detection often fails under distribution shifts, as it can be misled by spurious correlations between non-causal visual attributes (e.g., brightness, texture) and object categories. Existing test-time adaptation (TTA) methods either depend on costly online optimization or perform global calibration, overlooking the attribute-specific nature of these failures. To address this, we propose FACTOR (counterFACtual training-free Test-time adaptation for Open-vocabulaRy object detection), a lightweight framework grounded in counterfactual reasoning. By perturbing test images along non-causal attributes and comparing region-level predictions between original and counterfactual views, FACTOR quantifies attribute sensitivity, semantic relevance, and prediction variation to selectively suppress attribute-dependent predictions-without parameter updates. Experiments on PASCAL-C, COCO-C, and FoggyCityscapes show that FACTOR consistently outperforms prior TTA methods, demonstrating that explicit counterfactual reasoning effectively improves robustness under distribution shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FACTOR，一种无需参数更新的开放词汇目标检测测试时自适应框架，通过反事实推理机制识别并抑制非因果属性（如亮度、纹理）导致的虚假相关性，从而提升模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 开放词汇目标检测在分布偏移下往往失败，因为模型容易被非因果视觉属性（如亮度、纹理）与目标类别之间的虚假相关性所误导。现有的测试时自适应方法要么依赖昂贵的在线优化，要么进行全局校准，忽略了这些失败的特殊属性本质。
AI.method: FACTOR通过反事实推理进行无训练测试时自适应：1)沿非因果属性扰动测试图像；2)比较原始视图与反事实视图的区域级预测；3)量化属性敏感性、语义相关性和预测变化；4)选择性抑制属性依赖性预测，无需参数更新。
AI.result: 在PASCAL-C、COCO-C和FoggyCityscapes数据集上的实验表明，FACTOR一致优于现有的测试时自适应方法，证明显式反事实推理能有效提升分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明通过反事实推理机制，无需参数更新即可有效识别并抑制非因果属性对预测的影响，为开放词汇目标检测的分布偏移问题提供了一种轻量级且有效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about open-vocabulary object detection in images, NOT 3D human motion generation. While the paper mentions "counterfactual reasoning" and "VLM" which are tangentially related to some methods in the research profile, the core application (object detection) is entirely unrelated to computer graphics/3D human motion generation. The pain points, methods (diffusion for motion, SMPL-based representation), and objectives are fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on generating and controlling 3D human motion from video.

title: TACO: Trajectory Aligning Cross-view Optimisation
summary: Cross-View Geo-localisation (CVGL) matches ground imagery against satellite tiles to give absolute position fixes, an alternative to GNSS where signals are occluded, jammed, or spoofed. Recent fine-grained CVGL methods regress sub-tile metric pose, but have only been evaluated as one-shot localisers, never as the primary fix in a live pipeline. Inertial sensing provides high-rate relative motion, but accumulates unbounded drift without an absolute anchor. We propose TACO, a tightly-coupled IMU + fine-grained CVGL pipeline that consumes a single GNSS reading at start-up and thereafter operates on onboard sensing alone. A closed-form cross-track error model triggers CVGL before IMU drift exceeds the matcher's capture radius, and a forward-biased five-point multi-crop search keeps inference cost fixed at five forward passes per fix. A yaw-residual gate rejects fixes that disagree with the onboard compass, and an anisotropic body-frame noise model scales each Unscented Kalman Filter update by per-fix confidence. A factor graph with vetted loop closures provides an offline smoothed trajectory. On the KITTI raw dataset, TACO reduces median Absolute Trajectory Error (ATE) from 97.0m (IMU-only) to 16.3m, a 5.9 times reduction, at <0.1 ms per-frame fusion cost and a 5-10% camera duty cycle. Code is available: github.com/tavisshore/TACO.

AI.tldr: TACO是一个紧耦合IMU+精细CVGL的定位管道，单次GNSS启动后仅依赖车载感知，在KITTI数据集上将 median ATE从97.0m降至16.3m（5.9倍提升），融合成本<0.1ms/帧，相机占空比5-10%。
AI.motivation: 现有细粒度CVGL方法仅作为一次性定位器评估，从未作为实时管道的主要定位手段；而惯性导航虽提供高频率相对运动但会累积无界漂移。因此需要一种在GNSS信号受限环境下能够持续提供精确绝对定位的系统。
AI.method: 1) 闭环形式跨轨迹误差模型在IMU漂移超过匹配器捕获半径前触发CVGL；2) 前向偏置五点多crop搜索保持每次定位5次前向传递的固定推理成本；3) 航向残差门拒绝与 onboard 罗盘不符的定位；4) 各向异性体噪声模型按每次定位置信度缩放UKF更新；5) 带经验证回环闭合的因子图提供离线平滑轨迹。
AI.result: 在KITTI raw数据集上，TACO将中位数绝对轨迹误差(ATE)从97.0m（IMU-only）降至16.3m，实现5.9倍 reduction，融合成本<0.1ms/帧，相机占空比5-10%。
AI.conclusion: TACO成功实现了在单次GNSS启动后完全脱离GNSS的持续精确定位，通过紧耦合IMU和精细CVGL，显著降低了绝对轨迹误差，为GNSS受限环境下的定位提供了可行方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about IMU + camera fusion for autonomous vehicle localization (reducing ATE from 97.0m to 16.3m for vehicle trajectory), completely different application domain from 3D Human Motion Generation. It uses vehicle trajectory estimation, Kalman filtering, and factor graphs - not human motion generation methods. The domain is Robotics/Autonomous Vehicles/SLAM, not Computer Graphics or human motion synthesis.

title: Revisiting the Travel Planning Capabilities of Large Language Models
summary: Travel planning serves as a critical task for long-horizon reasoning, exposing significant deficits in LLMs. However, existing benchmarks and evaluations primarily assess final plans in an end-to-end manner, which lacks interpretability and makes it difficult to analyze the root causes of failures. To bridge this gap, we decompose travel planning into five constituent atomic sub-capabilities, including \emph{Constraint Extraction}, \emph{Tool Use}, \emph{Plan Generation}, \emph{Error Identification}, and \emph{Error Correction}. We implement a decoupled evaluation protocol leveraging oracle intermediate contexts to rigorously isolate these components, thereby measuring the atomic performance boundary without the noise of cascading errors. Our results highlight a clear contrast in performance: while LLMs are proficient in extracting explicit constraints, they struggle to infer implicit, open-world requirements. Furthermore, they exhibit structural biases in plan generation and suffer from ineffective self-correction, characterized by excessive sensitivity and erroneous persistence. These findings offer precise directions for improving LLM reasoning and planning abilities.

AI.tldr: 本文将旅行规划分解为五个原子子能力：约束提取、工具使用、计划生成、错误识别和错误修正，并提出解耦评估协议来隔离测量这些组件的性能。研究发现LLM在提取显式约束方面表现出色，但在推断隐式、开放世界需求方面存在困难，且在计划生成中存在结构性偏差，自修正能力无效（过度敏感和错误坚持）。
AI.motivation: 现有基准和评估主要对最终计划进行端到端评估，缺乏可解释性，难以分析失败的根本原因。需要一种更细粒度的方法来隔离分析LLM在旅行规划中各组件的能力。
AI.method: 将旅行规划分解为五个原子子能力（约束提取、工具使用、计划生成、错误识别、错误修正），利用oracle中间上下文实施解耦评估协议，隔离测量各组件性能，避免级联错误的干扰。
AI.result: LLM在提取显式约束方面表现擅长，但在推断隐式、开放世界需求方面存在困难；在计划生成中存在结构性偏差；自修正无效，表现为过度敏感和错误坚持。
AI.conclusion: 为改进LLM推理和规划能力提供了精确方向：需要提升隐式约束推断能力、减少计划生成的结构性偏差、增强有效的自我修正能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM capabilities for travel planning, focusing on constraint extraction, tool use, plan generation, and error correction. It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is completely different - this is NLP/AI research about language models for travel planning, not computer graphics, video generation, motion synthesis, or any related field. None of the methods (diffusion models, VLM for motion quality control, SMPL representation) or pain points (2D-to-3D motion extraction, temporal consistency) from the research profile are addressed.

title: AHPA: Adaptive Hierarchical Prior Alignment for Diffusion Transformers
summary: Representation alignment has recently emerged as an effective paradigm for accelerating Diffusion Transformer training. Despite their success, existing alignment methods typically impose a fixed supervision target or a fixed alignment granularity throughout the entire denoising trajectory, whether the guidance is provided by external vision encoders, internal self-representations, or VAE-derived features. We argue that such timestep-agnostic alignment is suboptimal because the useful granularity of representation supervision changes systematically with the signal-to-noise ratio. In high-noise regimes, diffusion models benefit more from coarse semantic and layout-level anchoring, whereas in low-noise regimes, the training signal should emphasize spatially detailed and structurally faithful refinement. This non-stationary alignment behavior creates a representational mismatch for static single-level supervisors. To address this issue, we propose Adaptive Hierarchical Prior Alignment (AHPA), a lightweight alignment framework that exploits the hierarchical representations naturally embedded in the frozen VAE encoder. Instead of using only a single compressed latent as the alignment target, AHPA extracts multi-level VAE features that provide complementary priors ranging from local geometry and spatial topology to coarse semantic layout. A timestep-conditioned Dynamic Router adaptively selects and weights these hierarchical priors along the denoising trajectory, thereby synchronizing the alignment granularity with the model's evolving training needs. Extensive experiments show that AHPA improves convergence and generation quality over baselines and incurs no additional inference cost while avoiding external encoder supervision during training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Adaptive Hierarchical Prior Alignment (AHPA)框架，解决Diffusion Transformer训练中表征对齐的粒度适配问题。核心思想是利用VAE编码器的多层次特征作为动态监督信号，通过时间步条件的动态路由器自适应选择和权重不同层次的先验，从而在不同信噪比阶段提供匹配的训练监督。
AI.motivation: 现有表征对齐方法使用固定监督目标或固定对齐粒度，这是次优的。因为随信噪比变化，最优表征监督粒度也改变：高噪声时需要粗粒度语义/布局锚定，低噪声时需要细节精炼。静态单级监督器无法适应这种非平稳的对齐需求，导致表征不匹配。
AI.method: 提出AHPA框架，包含两个核心组件：1)多层次VAE特征提取：从冻结的VAE编码器提取多层特征，提供从局部几何/空间拓扑到粗粒度语义布局的互补先验；2)时间步条件动态路由器：根据当前时间步自适应选择和权重不同层次的先验，实现随去噪轨迹动态调整的对齐粒度。
AI.result: 大量实验表明AHPA在收敛速度和生成质量上优于基线方法，且无额外推理成本，同时避免了外部视觉编码器的监督。
AI.conclusion: AHPA通过层次化先验和动态路由机制，有效解决了扩散模型训练中表征对齐粒度不随时间步适配的问题，为表征对齐提供了新的有效范式。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses representation alignment in Diffusion Transformers for general image/video generation, NOT 3D human motion generation. While it uses diffusion-based methods, the application domain is completely different - it's about improving image generation quality through表征对齐, not about extracting 3D motion from 2D video, bridging 2D-3D domain gaps, or SMPL/skeleton-based motion representation. The pain points in the research profile (VLM quality control, temporal motion consistency) are not addressed. This is a technical contribution to diffusion model training methodology, not a Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation paper.

title: Automated Large-scale CVRP Solver Design via LLM-assisted Flexible MCTS
summary: Solving large-scale CVRP (LSCVRP) with hundreds to thousands of nodes remains difficult for even state-of-the-art solvers. Divide-and-conquer can scale by decomposing the instance into size-reduced subproblems, but designing decomposition logic and configuring sub-solvers is highly expertise- and labor-intensive. Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as promising tools for automated algorithm design. However, existing LLM-driven approaches struggle with LSCVRP primarily due to the difficulty in generating sophisticated search strategies within a limited context window. To bridge this gap, we propose the LLM-assisted Flexible Monte Carlo Tree Search (LaF-MCTS), a novel framework that automates the design of high-performance LSCVRP solvers. We develop a three-tier decision hierarchy to enable incremental design of decomposition policies and sub-solvers for LSCVRP. To enable efficient search within the algorithmic hypothesis space, we introduce semantic pruning to eliminate semantically and structurally redundant codes, and branch regrowth to regenerate codes and preserve diversity. Extensive experiments on CVRPLib demonstrate that LaF-MCTS autonomously composes and optimizes decomposition-enhanced solvers that surpasses various state-of-the-art CVRP solvers.

AI.tldr: LaF-MCTS是一种利用大型语言模型自动设计大规模车辆路径问题（CVRP）求解器的新框架。该方法通过三层决策层次结构、语义剪枝和分支再生技术，在算法假设空间中进行高效搜索，自主构建出超越现有最先进求解器的高性能分解增强型求解器。
AI.motivation: 大规模CVRP（LSCVRP）问题节点数量众多，现有求解器难以有效处理。分解-征服方法虽能通过分解实例为子问题来扩展规模，但设计分解逻辑和配置子求解器需要高度专业知识和大量人工干预。现有LLM驱动的方法在处理LSCVRP时面临困难，主要因为在有限上下文窗口内难以生成复杂的搜索策略。
AI.method: 提出LLM辅助的灵活蒙特卡罗树搜索（LaF-MCTS）框架。该框架包含三层决策层次结构，实现分解策略和子求解器的增量设计。引入语义剪枝（semantic pruning）消除语义和结构上冗余的代码，以及分支再生（branch regrowth）重新生成代码并保持多样性。
AI.result: 在CVRPLib数据集上进行广泛实验。LaF-MCTS能够自主组合和优化分解增强型求解器，其性能超越了各种最先进的CVRP求解器。
AI.conclusion: 成功提出LaF-MCTS框架，为自动化算法设计提供了一种新的有效方法。通过LLM辅助的方式解决了大规模CVRP求解困难的问题，三层决策层次结构和相关技术的引入使得系统能够自动生成高质量的分解策略和子求解器配置。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses the Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP) in logistics/operations research, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. While it uses LLMs and MCTS, the application domain is logistics optimization, not graphics or motion generation. There is zero alignment with the research profile's field, pain points, or methods (video generation, VLM for motion quality control, diffusion-based motion generation, SMPL representations).

title: FreeTimeGS++: Secrets of Dynamic Gaussian Splatting and Their Principles
summary: The recent surge in 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) has achieved impressive dynamic scene reconstruction. While these methods demonstrate remarkable performance, the specific drivers behind such gains remain less explored, making a systematic understanding of the underlying principles challenging. In this paper, we perform a comprehensive analysis of these hidden factors to provide a clearer perspective on the 4DGS framework. We first establish a controlled baseline, FreeTimeGS_ours, by formalizing and reproducing the heuristics of the state-of-the-art FreeTimeGS. Using this framework, we dissect 4DGS along its fundamental axes and uncover key secrets, including the emergent temporal partitioning driven by Gaussian durations and the discrepancy between photometric fidelity and spatiotemporal consistency. Based on these insights, we propose FreeTimeGS++, a principled method that employs gated marginalization and neural velocity fields to achieve superior stability and robust dynamic representations. Our approach yields reproducible results with reduced run-to-run variance. We will release our implementation to provide a reliable foundation for future 4DGS research.

AI.tldr: 本文对4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) 动态场景重建方法进行了系统性分析，首次建立了可控基线FreeTimeGS_ours来复现FreeTimeGS的启发式方法，并在此基础上揭示了高斯时长驱动的emergent temporal partitioning和光度保真度与时空一致性之间的差异。基于这些发现，提出了FreeTimeGS++，采用门控边缘化和神经速度场实现更稳定的动态表示。
AI.motivation: 当前4DGS方法虽然取得了令人印象深刻的动态场景重建效果，但导致这些进展的具体驱动因素尚不清楚，缺乏对底层原理的系统性理解，使得后续研究和改进面临挑战。
AI.method: 1) 建立了FreeTimeGS_ours可控基线来形式化和复现FreeTimeGS的启发式方法；2) 沿基础轴对4DGS进行剖析，揭示了高斯时长驱动的emergent temporal partitioning机制；3) 发现了光度保真度与时空一致性之间的差异；4) 提出FreeTimeGS++，采用gated marginalization和neural velocity fields实现更稳健的动态表示。
AI.result: 所提出的FreeTimeGS++方法实现了更优的稳定性和鲁棒的动态表示，具有可复现的结果和降低的运行间方差。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统性分析揭示了4DGS的关键 secrets（高斯时长驱动的temporalpartitioning和光度保真度与时空一致性差异），基于此提出的FreeTimeGS++方法能够实现更稳定、可复现的动态场景重建，为未来4DGS研究提供了可靠基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 4D Gaussian Splatting for dynamic SCENE RECONSTRUCTION, not 3D human motion generation. While both deal with temporal dynamics, the application domain is completely different: scene-level rendering vs. human motion generation. The methods are also unrelated - Gaussian Splatting is a radiance field rendering technique, not a motion generation or video generation approach. The pain points are different - this paper addresses rendering artifacts and scene consistency, not extracting motion priors from video or maintaining motion naturalness. This would be useful for computer graphics rendering but not for the specific research area of human motion generation.

title: What Happens Inside Agent Memory? Circuit Analysis from Emergence to Diagnosis
summary: Agent memory failures are silent: an LLM-based agent can produce a fluent response even when it fails to extract, retain, or retrieve the information needed across sessions. The write-manage-read loop describes the external pipeline of these systems but leaves open which internal computations implement each stage. Tracing internal feature circuits across the Qwen-3 family (0.6B--14B) and two memory frameworks (mem0 and A-MEM), we report three findings. First, control is detectable before content: routing circuitry is causally active at 0.6B, while content circuitry produces no detectable signal until 4B under our tracing setup, creating a deployment regime where small models route with apparent competence but silently fail at extraction and grounding. Second, within the content group, Write and Read share a late-layer hub that operates as a context-grounding substrate already present in the base model; only memory framing recruits a functional grounding direction on this substrate, and the hub transfers across both frameworks. Third, emergence does not imply steerability: although the content circuit becomes detectable at 4B, it becomes reliably steerable only at 8B, indicating that detection and intervention have distinct scale thresholds. As a practical implication, the feature-space separation between the two circuit groups enables per-operation failure localization at 76.2% accuracy without supervision, providing a stage-level diagnostic for otherwise silent agent-memory failures.

AI.tldr: 研究LLM Agent的记忆失败问题，发现控制电路在0.6B参数即可检测，而内容电路需4B才能检测到，提出特征空间分离方法可实现76.2%的无监督故障定位。
AI.motivation: LLM Agent在跨会话操作中可能 silently fail，即表面生成流畅回复但实际未能正确提取、保留或检索所需信息。传统pipeline分析无法定位内部计算具体哪个环节出现问题。
AI.method: 通过特征电路追踪(feature circuit tracing)方法，分析Qwen-3家族(0.6B-14B)和两种记忆框架(mem0和A-MEM)在write-manage-read循环中的内部计算过程。

AI.conclusion: Agent memory failures本质上是可诊断的，控制与内容电路在特征空间中存在可分离的表示，为静默失败的阶段级定位提供了实用诊断方案。

title: MedSR-Vision: Deep Learning Framework for Multi-Domain Medical Image Super-Resolution
summary:
Medical image super-resolution (MedSR) is essential for improving diagnostic precision across diverse imaging modalities such as MRI, CT, X-ray, Ultrasound, and Fundus imaging. Despite rapid advances in deep learning, challenges remain in preserving anatomical accuracy, maintaining perceptual quality, and generalizing across medical domains. This paper presents MedSR-Vision, a novel unified deep learning framework for evaluating and comparing super-resolution models across five modalities: Brain MRI, Chest X-ray, Renal Ultrasound, Nephrolithiasis CT, and Spine MRI, at magnification scales of $\times2$, $\times3$, and $\times4$. Three representative models namely SRCNN, SwinIR, and Real-ESRGAN are benchmarked using multiple quantitative metrics encompassing fidelity, perceptual realism, and sharpness.
  Experimental analysis demonstrates that Real-ESRGAN achieves superior perceptual quality and edge recovery at higher scales, SwinIR excels in preserving structural and diagnostic features, and SRCNN provides efficient and stable performance at lower magnifications. The results establish domain-specific insights and practical guidelines for model selection in clinical imaging workflows, offering a standardized evaluation framework for future medical image super-resolution research and deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MedSR-Vision框架，统一评估医学图像超分辨率模型，为临床影像工作流中的模型选择提供标准化评估框架和实践指南。
AI.motivation: 医学图像超分辨率(MedSR)对于提高MRI、CT、X射线、超声和眼底成像等多种模态的诊断精度至关重要。尽管深度学习进展迅速，但在保持解剖准确性、感知质量和跨领域泛化方面仍面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出MedSR-Vision统一深度学习框架，在5种模态(脑MRI、胸部X光、肾超声、肾结石CT、脊柱MRI)和3种放大倍数(×2、×3、×4)下评估比较超分辨率模型。基准测试三个代表性模型：SRCNN、SwinIR和Real-ESRGAN，使用保真度、感知真实度和清晰度等多个定量指标。
AI.result: Real-ESRGAN在高放大倍数下获得最佳感知质量和边缘恢复；SwinIR在保留结构和诊断特征方面表现最优；SRCNN在较低放大倍数下提供高效稳定的性能。实验结果确立了对模态特定的见解和模型选择实践指南。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了医学图像超分辨率的领域特定见解，为临床影像工作流中的模型选择提供实践指南，为未来医学图像超分辨率研究和部署提供标准化评估框架。

title: ReasonAudio: A Benchmark for Evaluating Reasoning Beyond Matching in Text-Audio Retrieval
summary: As multimodal content continues to expand at a rapid pace, audio retrieval has emerged as a key enabling technology for media search, content organization, and intelligent assistants. However, most existing benchmarks concentrate on semantic matching and fail to capture the fact that real-world queries often demand advanced reasoning abilities, including negation understanding, temporal ordering, concurrent event recognition, and duration discrimination. To address this gap, we introduce ReasonAudio, the first reasoning-intensive benchmark for Text-Audio Retrieval, comprising 1,000 queries and 10,000 composite audio clips across five fundamental reasoning tasks: Negation, Order, Overlap, Duration, and Mix. Despite their intuitive nature for humans and straightforward construction, these tasks pose significant challenges to current models. Our evaluation of ten state-of-the-art models reveals the following findings: All models struggle with reasoning-intensive audio retrieval, performing particularly poorly on Negation and Duration while showing relatively better results on Overlap and Order. Moreover, Multimodal Large Language Model-based embedding models fail to inherit the reasoning capabilities of their backbones through contrastive fine-tuning, suggesting that current training paradigms are insufficient to preserve reasoning capacity in retrieval settings

AI.tldr: ReasonAudio是首个针对文本-音频检索的推理密集型基准，包含五个推理任务和1,000个查询。评估十个最先进模型发现所有模型在Negation和Duration任务上表现最差，且当前训练范式无法保留检索设置中的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有音频检索基准集中于语义匹配，未能捕捉真实世界查询所需的推理能力，包括否定理解、时序排列、重叠事件识别和时长判别。
AI.method: 构建了ReasonAudio基准，包含1,000个查询和10,000个复合音频片段，涵盖五个推理任务：Negation（否定理解）、Order（时序排列）、Overlap（重叠事件识别）、Duration（时长判别）和Mix（混合任务）。对十个最先进模型进行系统评估。

AI.conclusion: 当前模型在推理密集型音频检索任务上表现不佳，尤其是Negation和Duration任务。基于多模态大语言模型的嵌入模型未能通过对比微调继承其骨干模型的推理能力，表明当前训练范式不足以保留检索设置中的推理能力。

title: VLMaxxing through FrameMogging Training-Free Anti-Recomputation for Video Vision-Language Models
comment: 37 pages, 6 figures, 22 tables; code and artifacts available at https://github.com/jfbastien/VLMaxxing
summary:
Video vision-language models (VLMs) keep paying for visual state the stream already told us was stable. The factory wall did not move, but most VLM pipelines still hand the model dense RGB frames or a fresh prefix again. We study that waste as training-free anti-recomputation: reuse state when validation says it survives, and buy fresh evidence when the scene, query, or cache topology requires it.
  The largest measured win is after ingest. On frozen Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct-4bit, adaptive same-video follow-up reuse preserves paired choices and correctness on a 93-query VideoMME breadth setting while reducing follow-up latency by 14.90-35.92x. The first query is still cold; the win starts when later questions reuse the same video state. Stress tests bound the result: repeated-question schedules hold through 50 turns, while dense-answer-anchored prompt variation separates conservative fixed K=1 repair from faster aggressive policies that drift.
  Fresh-video pruning is smaller but real. C-VISION skips timed vision-tower work before the first answer is generated. On Gemma 4-E4B-4bit, the clean 32f short cell reaches 1.316x first-query speedup with no paired drift or parse failures on 20 items; Qwen shows the fidelity/speed boundary.
  Stage-share ceiling (C-CEILING) is the accounting guardrail: a component speedup becomes an end-to-end speedup only in proportion to the wall-clock share it accelerates, so C-VISION and after-ingest follow-up reuse do not multiply. Candidate C-STREAM remains a native-rate target, not a headline result here. The broader direction is VLM-native media that expose change, motion, uncertainty, object state, sensor time, and active tiles directly, so models do not have to rediscover the world from dense RGB every frame.

AI.tldr: 本文研究视频视觉语言模型(VLM)中的训练无关反重构方法，通过在验证状态存活时重用视觉状态、在需要新证据时才获取新帧，来减少冗余的视觉信息处理开销。实验表明该方法在Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct-4bit上可将后续查询延迟降低14.90-35.92倍。
AI.motivation: 当前的VLM流程即使在视觉状态已经稳定的情况下，仍然重复处理密集的RGB帧或重新获取新的视觉前缀，造成计算资源的浪费。作者认为这种冗余处理是可以避免的。
AI.method: 提出两种训练无关的优化策略：1) 自适应同视频后续重用：当验证表明视觉状态存活时复用已有状态，需要新证据时才获取新帧；2) 新视频修剪：在生成答案前跳过视觉塔的时序工作。使用VideoMME基准和多种模型(Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct-4bit、Gemma 4-E4B-4bit)进行测试。
AI.result: 后续查询重用策略在93查询的VideoMME breadth设置中使后续查询延迟降低14.90-35.92倍，同时保持配对选择和正确率。新视频修剪在Gemma模型上实现1.316x的首查询加速，无配对漂移或解析失败。但策略存在限制：50轮重复问题保持效果，但密集答案锚定的提示变化会将保守固定策略与快速激进策略区分开来。
AI.conclusion: 组件加速仅在与端到端加速成比例时才有效，建议VLM应原生支持暴露变化、运动、不确定性、对象状态、传感器时间和主动瓦片等媒体，使模型无需每帧都从密集RGB重新发现世界。

title: GeoDecider: A Coarse-to-Fine Agentic Workflow for Explainable Lithology Classification
summary: Lithology classification aims to infer subsurface rock types from well-logging signals, supporting downstream applications like reservoir characterization. Despite substantial progress, most existing methods still treat lithology classification as a single-pass classification task. In contrast, practical experts incorporate geological principles, external knowledge, and tool-use capabilities to perform accurate classification. In this work, we propose GeoDecider, a coarse-to-fine agentic workflow that enables accurate and explainable lithology classification through training-free use of large language models (LLMs). GeoDecider reformulates lithology classification as an expert-like structured process and organizes it into a multi-stage workflow involving coarse-to-fine reasoning. Specifically, GeoDecider includes the following stages: (1) base classifier-guided coarse classification, which uses a pre-trained classifier to provide a rough reference for downstream tasks, thus reducing the overall cost of downstream reasoning, (2) tool-augmented reasoning, which utilizes several tools such as contextual analysis and neighbor retrieval to achieve finer and more precise classifications, (3) geological refinement, which post-processes the final results to enforce geological consistency. Experiments on four benchmarks show that GeoDecider outperforms representative baselines. Further analysis demonstrates that the proposed framework produces geologically interpretable predictions while achieving a better trade-off between classification performance and inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: GeoDecider是一种基于大型语言模型(LLM)的无训练岩性分类智能体工作流，采用粗到细的多阶段推理流程，包括基分类器引导的粗分类、工具增强的推理和地质精炼三个阶段，旨在实现类似专家的准确且可解释的岩性分类。
AI.motivation: 现有岩性分类方法将其视为单次分类任务，而实际地质专家会结合地质原理、外部知识和工具使用来进行准确分类。现有方法缺乏类似专家的多阶段推理能力。
AI.method: 提出GeoDecider框架，包含三个阶段：(1)基分类器引导的粗分类，使用预训练分类器提供粗糙参考，降低下游推理成本；(2)工具增强的推理，利用上下文分析和邻居检索等工具实现更精细的分类；(3)地质精炼，对最终结果进行后处理以确保地质一致性。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上的实验表明，GeoDecider优于代表性基线方法。该框架能够产生地质可解释的预测，同时在分类性能和推理效率之间实现更好的权衡。
AI.conclusion: GeoDecider通过模拟专家的分类思维过程，成功将岩性分类从单次任务转变为结构化多阶段推理任务，在提升分类准确性的同时保证了可解释性和推理效率。

title: Can Multimodal Large Language Models Understand Pathologic Movements? A Pilot Study on Seizure Semiology
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated robust capabilities in recognizing everyday human activities, yet their potential for analyzing clinically significant involuntary movements in neurological disorders remains largely unexplored. This pilot study evaluates the capability of MLLMs for automated recognition of pathological movements in seizure videos. We assessed the zero-shot performance of state-of-the-art MLLMs on 20 ILAE-defined semiological features across 90 clinical seizure recordings. MLLMs outperformed fine-tuned Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and Vision Transformer (ViT) baseline models on 13 of 18 features without task-specific training, demonstrating particular strength in recognizing salient postural and contextual features while struggling with subtle, high-frequency movements. Feature-targeted signal enhancement (facial cropping, pose estimation, audio denoising) improved performance on 10 of 20 features. Expert evaluation showed that 94.3 percent of MLLM-generated explanations for correctly predicted cases achieved at least 60 percent faithfulness scores, aligning with epileptologist reasoning. These findings demonstrate the potential of adapting general-purpose MLLMs for specialized clinical video analysis through targeted preprocessing strategies, offering a path toward interpretable, efficient diagnostic assistance. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/LinaZhangUCLA/PathMotionMLLM.

AI.tldr: 首次评估多模态大语言模型在癫痫视频中自动识别病理运动的能力_zero-shot性能优于微调CNN和ViT模型

title: Robust Agent Compensation (RAC): Teaching AI Agents to Compensate
comment: Accepted at ACM Conference on AI and Agentic Systems (ACM CAIS 2026)
summary: We present Robust Agent Compensation (RAC), a log-based recovery paradigm (providing a safety net) implemented through an architectural extension that can be applied to most Agent frameworks to support reliable executions (avoiding unintended side effects). Users can choose to enable RAC without changing their current agent code (e.g., LangGraph agents). The proposed approach can be implemented in most existing agent frameworks via their existing extension points. We present an implementation based on LangChain, demonstrate its viability through the $τ$-bench and REALM-Bench, and show that when solving complex problems, RAC is 1.5-8X or more better in both latency and token economy compared to state-of-the-art LLM-based recovery approaches.

AI.method: 通过架构扩展点在现有Agent框架（如LangChain/LangGraph）中实现基于日志的恢复机制，无需修改用户代码。

AI.conclusion: RAC可作为大多数Agent框架的通用扩展，通过日志恢复机制有效提升Agent执行的可靠性和效率。

title: Tracing Like a Clinician: Anatomy-Guided Spatial Priors for Cephalometric Landmark Detection
summary: When orthodontists trace cephalometric radiographs, they follow a structured workflow: identify the soft tissue profile, partition the skull into anatomical regions, trace contours, and locate landmarks using geometric definitions -- yet no automated system replicates this reasoning. We present a five-phase anatomy-guided initialization pipeline that translates this clinical workflow into computational operations, producing confidence-weighted spatial attention priors for a downstream HRNet-W32 detector. On 1,502 radiographs from three sources spanning 7+ imaging devices, the system achieves 1.04 mm mean radial error on 25 landmarks -- surpassing prior state-of-the-art (1.23 mm on 19 landmarks) by 15.4%, with twelve landmarks below 1 mm. A three-way controlled ablation reveals two striking findings. First, removing anatomical priors does not merely slow convergence -- it destroys generalization: both models converge to ~1.03 mm on validation, but diverge to 1.94 vs. 1.04 mm on the test set. Second, replacing anatomical priors with random-position Gaussians produces even worse generalization (2.24 mm), confirming that the improvement derives from anatomically correct positioning, not additional input channels. Clinical domain knowledge encoded as spatial priors provides an inductive bias that architecture and data augmentation alone do not provide.

AI.tldr: 提出一个五阶段解剖引导的初始化流水线，将正畸临床工作流程转化为计算操作，为下游HRNet-W32检测器产生置信度加权空间注意力先验，在1502张X光片上实现1.04mm平均径向误差，超越之前最先进水平15.4%。
AI.motivation: 正畸医师在追踪头影测量X光片时有结构化工作流程（识别软组织轮廓、分分区、追踪轮廓、使用几何定义定位标志点），但现有自动化系统无法复制这种临床推理过程。
AI.method: 设计五阶段解剖引导初始化管道：1)识别软组织轮廓 2)分区颅骨解剖区域 3)追踪轮廓 4)使用几何定义定位标志点 5)生成置信度加权空间注意力先验，传入下游HRNet-W32检测器。
AI.result: 在1502张来自3个来源跨越7+成像设备的X光片上实现25个标志点1.04mm平均径向误差，比之前SOTA(1.23mm@19标志点)提升15.4%，12个标志点低于1mm。三路对照消融实验显示：去除解剖先验模型在验证集收敛到~1.03mm但在测试集发散到1.94mm；用随机位置高斯替换解剖先验产生更差泛化(2.24mm)。
AI.conclusion: 临床领域知识编码的空间先验提供了一种归纳偏差，这是架构和数据增强单独无法提供的。该方法成功将正畸医师的专业推理转化为可计算的自动化系统。
