title: Geometry over Density: Few-Shot Cross-Domain OOD Detection
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection identifies test samples that fall outside a model's training distribution, a capability critical for safe deployment in high-stakes applications. Standard OOD detectors are trained on a specific in-distribution (ID) dataset and detect deviations from that single domain. In contrast, we study few-shot cross-domain OOD detection: given a \emph{single} pre-trained model, can we perform OOD detection on \emph{arbitrary} new ID-OOD task pairs using only a handful of ID samples at inference time, with no additional training? We propose \textbf{UFCOD}, a unified framework that achieves this goal through information-geometric analysis of diffusion trajectories. Our key insight is that diffusion noise predictions are score functions (gradients of log-density), and we extract two energy features: \emph{Path Energy} (integrated score magnitude) and \emph{Dynamics Energy} (score smoothness), that form a discrete Sobolev norm capturing how samples interact with the learned diffusion process. The central contribution is a \textbf{train-once, deploy-anywhere} paradigm: a diffusion model trained on a single dataset (e.g., CelebA) serves as a universal feature extractor for OOD detection across semantically unrelated domains (e.g., CIFAR-10, SVHN, Textures). At deployment, each new task requires only $\sim$100 unlabeled ID samples for inference: no retraining, no fine-tuning, no task-specific adaptation. Using 100 ID samples per task, UFCOD achieves 93.7\% average AUROC across 12 cross-domain benchmarks, competitive with methods trained on 50k--163k samples, demonstrating $\sim$500$\times$ improvement in sample efficiency. See our code in https://github.com/lili0415/UFCOD.

AI.tldr: UFCOD是一个统一的少样本跨域分布外(OOD)检测框架，利用扩散模型的噪声预测作为分数函数（对数密度的梯度），提取路径能量和动力学能量两个特征，在单个数据集上训练后可部署到任意新领域，仅需约100个无标签样本即可实现高效OOD检测。
AI.motivation: 标准OOD检测器只能在单一域上检测，而实际应用中需要处理任意新任务对；同时现有方法需要大量训练样本（50k-163k），样本效率低下。研究者希望实现"训练一次，部署 anywhere"的通用OOD检测。
AI.method: 利用扩散模型噪声预测作为分数函数（log-density的梯度），提取两个能量特征：Path Energy（积分分数幅度）和Dynamics Energy（分数平滑度），形成离散Sobolev范数来捕获样本与扩散过程的交互。
AI.result: 在12个跨域基准上使用每任务100个ID样本达到93.7%平均AUROC，与使用50k-163k样本的方法相当，样本效率提升约500倍。
AI.conclusion: 成功实现了基于扩散轨迹信息几何分析的少样本跨域OOD检测，在无需重新训练的情况下可泛化到语义无关的新领域，具有极高的样本效率和应用价值。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection using diffusion models, which is a completely different application domain from 3D Human Motion Generation. While both use diffusion models, this paper applies them to machine learning robustness (detecting samples outside training distribution), not to generating human motion. The research profile focuses on video-to-motion conversion, temporal motion consistency, SMPL-based representations, and computer graphics - none of which are addressed by this OOD detection work.

title: Mix3R: Mixing Feed-forward Reconstruction and Generative 3D Priors for Joint Multi-view Aligned 3D Reconstruction and Pose Estimation
summary: Recent trends in sparse-view 3D reconstruction have taken two different paths: feed-forward reconstruction that predicts pixel-aligned point maps without a complete geometry, and generative 3D reconstruction that generates complete geometry but often with poor input-alignment. We present Mix3R, a novel generative 3D reconstruction method which mixes feed-forward reconstruction and 3D generation into a single framework in an aligned manner. Mix3R generates a 3D shape in two stages: a sparse voxel generation stage and a textured geometry generation stage. Unlike pure generative methods, our first-stage generation jointly produces a coarse 3D structure (sparse voxels), per-view point maps and camera parameters aligned to that 3D structure. This is made possible by introducing a Mixture-of-Transformers architecture that inserts global self-attentions to a feed-forward reconstruction model and a 3D generative model, both pretrained on large-scale data. This design effectively retains the pretrained priors but enables better 2D-3D alignment. Based on the initial aligned generations of sparse 3D voxels and point maps, we compute an overlap-based attention bias that is directly added to another pretrained textured geometry generation model, enabling it to correctly place input textures onto generated shapes in a training-free manner. Our design brings mutual benefits to both feed-forward reconstruction and 3D generation: The feed-forward branch learns to ground its predictions to a generative 3D prior, and conversely, the 3D generation branch is conditioned on geometrically informative features from the feed-forward branch. As a result, our method produces 3D shapes with better input alignment compared with pure 3D generative methods, together with camera pose estimations more accurate than previous feed-forward reconstruction methods. Our project page is at https://jsnln.github.io/mix3r/

AI.tldr: Mix3R是一种将前馈重建与生成式3D重建相结合的新框架，通过Mixture-of-Transformers架构实现稀疏体素、点地图和相机参数的联合生成，并利用重叠注意力偏置实现无监督的纹理放置。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏视角3D重建方法存在两个问题：前馈重建无法生成完整几何形状，而生成式方法缺乏输入对齐。现有方法难以同时实现良好的2D-3D对齐和完整几何生成。
AI.method: Mix3R采用两阶段生成：(1)稀疏体素生成阶段，使用Mixture-of-Transformers架构联合生成稀疏体素、点地图和相机参数，保持预训练先验的同时实现对齐；(2)纹理几何生成阶段，基于重叠注意力偏置将纹理无监督地放置到生成的几何形状上。
AI.result: Mix3R方法实现了比纯生成方法更好的输入对齐，同时产生比前馈方法更准确的相机姿态估计。
AI.conclusion: Mix3R通过将前馈重建和3D生成相结合，实现了互惠互利：前馈分支学习基于生成式3D先验进行预测，3D生成分支则受前馈分支的几何信息特征条件化，最终在输入对齐和相机估计方面都取得了性能提升。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D SCENE reconstruction from sparse multi-view inputs, not 3D HUMAN MOTION generation. Completely different application domain - deals with reconstructing static geometry/objects from multiple cameras, not generating temporal human motion from video. The pain points are entirely unrelated (no motion priors extraction, no 2D-to-3D motion bridging, no temporal consistency for motion). Methods are also different (Mixture-of-Transformers for scene reconstruction vs diffusion/SMPL for motion generation).

title: Dynamic Distillation and Gradient Consistency for Robust Long-Tailed Incremental Learning
summary: The task of Long-tailed Class Incremental Learning (LT-CIL) addresses the sequential learning of new classes from datasets with imbalanced class distributions. This scenario intensifies the fundamental problem of catastrophic forgetting, inherent to continual learning, with the dual challenges of under-learning minority classes and overfitting majority classes. To tackle these combined issues, this paper proposes two main techniques. First, we introduce gradient consistency regularization, which leverages the moving average of gradients to suppress abrupt fluctuations and stabilize the training process. Second, we dynamically adjust the weight of the distillation loss by measuring the degree of class imbalance with normalized entropy. This adaptive weighting establishes an optimal balance between retaining old knowledge and acquiring new information. Experiments on the CIFAR-100-LT, ImageNetSubset-LT, and Food101-LT benchmarks show that our method achieves consistent accuracy improvements of up to 5.0\%. Furthermore, we demonstrate dramatic gains in the challenging 'In-ordered' setting, where tasks progress from majority to minority classes, highlighting our method's robustness in mitigating forgetting under unfavorable learning dynamics. This enhanced performance is achieved without a significant increase in computational overhead, demonstrating the practicality of our framework.

AI.tldr: 针对长尾分布下的类增量学习问题，提出梯度一致性正则化和自适应蒸馏损失权重调整两项技术，有效缓解灾难性遗忘，在多个基准数据集上实现显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 长尾类增量学习（LT-CIL）处理从类别不平衡分布数据集中顺序学习新类别的任务，面临灾难性遗忘、少数类欠学习和多数类过拟合的三重挑战。
AI.method: 提出两种技术：1) 梯度一致性正则化，利用梯度移动平均抑制训练波动，稳定学习过程；2) 通过归一化熵动态测量类别不平衡程度，自适应调整蒸馏损失权重，在保留旧知识和学习新知识之间建立最优平衡。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100-LT、ImageNetSubset-LT和Food101-LT基准数据集上实现最高5.0%的准确率提升；在"In-ordered"设置（任务从多数类进展到少数类）中获得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在不显著增加计算开销的情况下，有效缓解了长尾分布下的灾难性遗忘问题，特别是在"In-ordered"设置（从多数类到少数类）展现出显著优势，证明了框架的实用性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about long-tailed class incremental learning for image classification tasks (CIFAR-100-LT, ImageNetSubset-LT), which is completely unrelated to 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. The application domain is fundamentally different - it's image recognition/classification, not motion generation. While the paper mentions distillation and gradient consistency, these are techniques for addressing catastrophic forgetting in image classification, not for generating or understanding human motion. The paper has no connection to video generation, SMPL/skeleton-based motion representation, temporal motion consistency, or any of the pain points/methods specified in the research profile.

title: Replacing Parameters with Preferences: Federated Alignment of Heterogeneous Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have broad potential in privacy-sensitive domains such as healthcare and finance, yet strict data-sharing constraints render centralized training infeasible. Federated Learning mitigates this issue by enabling decentralized training, but practical deployments face challenges due to client heterogeneity in computational resources, application requirements, and model architectures. Under extreme model and data heterogeneity, replacing parameter aggregation with preference-based collaboration offers a more suitable interface, as it eliminates the need for direct parameter or data exchange. Motivated by this, we propose MoR, a federated alignment framework that combines GRPO with Mixture-of-Rewards for heterogeneous VLMs. In MoR, each client locally trains a reward model from local preference annotations, capturing specific evaluation signals without exposing raw data. To combine these heterogeneous supervision signals, MoR introduces a Mixture-of-Rewards mechanism with learned routing, which adaptively fuses client reward models according to the input and alignment objective. The server then optimizes a base VLM using GRPO with a KL penalty to a reference model, enabling preference alignment without requiring client models to share architectures or parameters. Experiments on diverse public vision-language benchmarks demonstrate that MoR consistently outperforms federated alignment baselines in generalization and cross-client adaptability. Our approach provides a scalable solution for privacy-preserving alignment of heterogeneous VLMs under federated settings.

AI.tldr: MoR是一个针对异构VLMs的联邦对齐框架，通过结合GRPO与Mixture-of-Rewards机制，实现隐私保护下的偏好对齐。客户端本地训练奖励模型捕获特定评估信号，服务器端通过GRPO与KL惩罚优化基础模型，无需共享原始数据或模型参数。
AI.motivation: VLMs在医疗、金融等隐私敏感领域有广阔应用前景，但严格的数据共享约束使得集中式训练不可行。联邦学习虽能实现去中心化训练，但在极端模型和数据异构性下面临挑战。传统的参数聚合方法需要直接交换参数或数据，不适用于此类场景。偏好-based协作提供更合适的接口，可消除参数或数据直接交换的需求。
AI.method: 提出MoR框架，结合GRPO与Mixture-of-Rewards机制。具体包括：(1)客户端本地训练奖励模型，从本地偏好标注中学习特定评估信号；(2)Mixture-of-Rewards机制通过学习路由自适应融合不同客户端的奖励模型；(3)服务器使用GRPO结合KL惩罚项优化基础VLM，无需共享模型架构或参数。
AI.result: 在多种公开视觉语言基准数据集上的实验表明，MoR在泛化能力和跨客户端适应性方面始终优于联邦对齐基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MoR为联邦设置下异构VLMs的隐私保护对齐提供了可扩展的解决方案，能够在满足数据隐私约束的同时，有效整合来自不同客户端的异构偏好信号，实现跨客户端的良好泛化性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely irrelevant to the research profile. While it mentions Vision-Language Models (VLMs), the application domain is entirely different - it's about federated alignment of VLMs for privacy-sensitive domains (medical, financial), not Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. The methods (GRPO, Mixture-of-Rewards, federated learning) are unrelated to diffusion-based motion generation, SMPL/skeleton-based representations, video generation models, or multi-modal feature fusion for motion synthesis. There's no connection to extracting 3D motion from 2D video, temporal consistency in human motion, or any computer graphics domain. The paper addresses VLM alignment in distributed systems, not motion generation quality control or 3D motion priors.

title: Dual-Foundation Models for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
comment: 15 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at the 28th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2026)
summary: Semantic segmentation provides pixel-level scene understanding essential for autonomous driving and fine-grained perception tasks. However, training segmentation models requires costly, labor-intensive annotations on real-world datasets. Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) addresses this by training models on labeled synthetic data and adapting them to unlabeled real images. While conceptually simple, adaptation is challenging due to the domain gap, i.e., differences in visual appearance and scene structure between synthetic and real data. Prior approaches bridge this gap through pixel-level mixing or feature-level contrastive learning. Yet, these techniques suffer from two major limitations: (1) reliance on high-confidence pseudo-labels restricts learning to a subset of the target domain, and (2) prototype-based contrastive methods initialize class prototypes from source-trained models, yielding biased and unstable anchors during adaptation. To address these issues, we propose a dual-foundation UDA framework that leverages two complementary foundation models. First, we employ the Segment Anything Model (SAM) with superpixel-guided prompting to enable learning from a broader range of target pixels beyond high-confidence predictions. Second, we incorporate DINOv3 to construct stable, domain-invariant class prototypes through its robust representation learning. Our method achieves consistent improvements of +1.3% and +1.4% mIoU over strong UDA baselines on GTA-to-Cityscapes and SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双基础模型的无监督域适应（UDA）框架，用于语义分割。利用SAM（Segment Anything Model）的超像素引导提示学习更广泛的目标域像素，结合DINOv3构建稳定的类别原型。在GTA-to-Cityscapes和SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes数据集上分别提升1.3%和1.4%的mIoU。
AI.motivation: 现有UDA方法存在两大局限：(1)依赖高置信度伪标签，限制了对目标域的学习范围；(2)基于源域模型初始化的类别原型存在偏差且不稳定。因此需要新的方法来扩展学习范围并构建更稳健的原型。
AI.method: 提出双基础模型UDA框架：1) 使用SAM的超像素引导提示机制，使模型能够从更广泛的目标域像素中学习；2) 引入DINOv3构建稳定、域不变的类别原型，利用其强大的表示学习能力。
AI.result: 在GTA-to-Cityscapes和SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes两大基准上分别实现+1.3%和+1.4%的mIoU提升，超越现有强UDA基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合SAM和DINOv3两种互补的基础模型，成功解决了UDA中伪标签限制和学习不稳定的问题，为语义分割的域适应提供了新的有效范式。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses unsupervised domain adaptation for SEMANTIC SEGMENTATION ( Computer Vision - pixel-wise image classification), which is completely different from 3D HUMAN MOTION GENERATION (Computer Graphics). While both research profiles involve domain adaptation, the target domains are entirely different: the paper adapts from synthetic to real images for segmentation, whereas the research profile needs to bridge 2D video to 3D motion space. The methods mentioned (SAM, DINOv3) are image segmentation foundation models, not motion generation models. There is no mention of diffusion-based motion generation, SMPL/skeleton-based representation, video-to-motion extraction, or temporal motion consistency. The application domains are fundamentally incompatible.

title: FinSTaR: Towards Financial Reasoning with Time Series Reasoning Models
summary: Time series (TS) reasoning models (TSRMs) have shown promising capabilities in general domains, yet they consistently fail on financial domain, which exhibit unique characteristics. We propose a general 2x2 capability taxonomy for TSRMs by crossing 1) single-entity vs. multi-entity analysis with 2) assessment of the current state vs. prediction of future behavior. We instantiate this taxonomy in the financial domain -- where the distinction between deterministic assessment and stochastic prediction is particularly critical -- as ten financial reasoning tasks, forming the FinTSR-Bench benchmark based on S&P stocks. To this end, we propose FinSTaR (Financial Time Series Thinking and Reasoning), trained on FinTSR-Bench with distinct chain-of-thought (CoT) strategies tailored to each category. For assessment, which is deterministic (i.e., computable from observable data), we employ Compute-in-CoT, a programmatic CoT that enables models to derive answers directly from raw prices. For prediction, which is inherently stochastic (i.e., subject to unobservable factors), we adopt Scenario-Aware CoT, which generates diverse scenarios before making a judgment, mirroring how financial analysts reason under uncertainty. The proposed method achieves 78.9% average accuracy on FinTSR-Bench, substantially outperforming LLM and TSRM baselines. Furthermore, we show that the four capability categories are complementary and mutually reinforcing through joint training, and that Scenario-Aware CoT consistently improves prediction accuracy over standard CoT. Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/seunghan96/FinSTaR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FinSTaR（金融时序思考推理模型），针对金融领域构建2x2能力分类体系，结合Compute-in-CoT和Scenario-Aware CoT两种思维链策略，在FinTSR-Bench基准上达到78.9%平均准确率，显著优于现有LLM和TSRM基线模型。
AI.motivation: 时序推理模型在通用领域表现良好，但在金融领域（具有独特特征） consistently fail。金融领域特别需要区分确定性评估与随机性预测，因为金融数据具有独特的噪声和模式。
AI.method: 提出2x2能力分类学：1）单实体vs多实体分析 × 2）当前状态评估vs未来行为预测。针对评估任务（确定性）采用Compute-in-CoT（程序化思维链）直接从原始价格推导答案；针对预测任务（随机性）采用Scenario-Aware CoT（场景感知思维链）先生成多样场景再判断，模拟金融分析师的不确定性推理方式。基于S&P股票构建包含10个金融推理任务的FinTSR-Bench基准。
AI.result: 在FinTSR-Bench上达到78.9%平均准确率，显著优于LLM和TSRM基线模型。四种能力类别通过联合训练互为补充、互相增强。Scenario-Aware CoT相比标准CoT持续提升预测准确率。
AI.conclusion: FinSTaR成功解决了金融时序推理难题，两种定制思维链策略有效区分了确定性评估与随机性预测任务。2x2能力分类体系为金融时序推理研究提供了系统化框架，验证了四种能力类别的互补性和互强化效果。

title: SoDa2: Single-Stage Open-Set Domain Adaptation via Decoupled Alignment for Cross-Scene Hyperspectral Image Classification
summary: Cross-scene hyperspectral image (HSI) classification stands as a fundamental research topic in remote sensing, with extensive applications spanning various fields. Owing to the inclusion of unknown categories in the target domain and the existence of domain shift across different scenes, open-set domain adaptation techniques are commonly employed to address cross-scene HSI classification. However, existing open-set cross-scene HSI classification methods still face two critical challenges: (1) domain shift issues arising from the direct alignment of mixed spectral-spatial features; (2) high computational costs caused by two-stage training strategies. To address these issues, this paper proposes a single-stage open-set domain adaptation method with decoupled alignment (SoDa$^2$) for cross-scene HSI classification. A contribution-aware dual-modality feature extraction is customized to disentangle the characteristics from spectral sequence signals and spatial details, selectively and adaptively enhancing discriminative features. The decoupled alignment module minimizes the Maximum Mean Discrepancy to independently reduce the spectral discrepancy and the spatial discrepancy between the source and target domains, extracting more fine-grained domain-invariant features. A cost-effective single-stage dual-branch framework is designed to learn MMD-constrainted aligned features and constraint-free intrinsic features for adaptive distinction between known and unknown classes. This framework employs a Gaussian Mixture Model to model the squared cosine similarity distribution between the two feature types, enabling open-set recognition without prior knowledge of unknown classes. Extensive experiments on three groups of HSI datasets demonstrate that SoDa$^2$ outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving superior classification accuracy and model transferability for open-set cross-scene tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SoDa²方法，解决跨场景高光谱图像开放集分类中的域偏移和计算成本问题，采用解耦对齐和单阶段双分支框架，在三个数据集上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 跨场景高光谱图像(HSI)分类是遥感中的基础研究课题，但面临两个关键挑战：(1)混合光谱-空间特征直接对齐导致的域偏移问题；(2)两阶段训练策略导致的高计算成本。
AI.method: 提出单阶段开放集域适应方法SoDa²，包含：贡献感知双模态特征提取模块解耦光谱序列信号和空间细节特征；解耦对齐模块独立减少源域和目标域之间的光谱和空间差异；成本有效的单阶段双分支框架学习MMD约束对齐特征和无约束内在特征；使用高斯混合模型对两种特征类型之间的平方余弦相似度分布进行建模。
AI.result: 在三个HSI数据集组上进行广泛实验，SoDa²优于最先进的方法，为开放集跨场景任务实现了卓越的分类精度和模型迁移性。
AI.conclusion: SoDa²通过单阶段框架和解耦对齐策略有效解决了域偏移和高计算成本问题，在跨场景HSI分类中表现出色。

relevance_reason: This paper is about hyperspectral image classification for remote sensing (cross-scene HSI classification), which is entirely unrelated to 3D human motion generation in Computer Graphics. The application domains are completely different: remote sensing/image classification vs human motion generation. While the research profile focuses on video generation models, VLMs, diffusion-based motion generation, and SMPL-based representations for extracting 3D human motion from 2D videos, this paper addresses spectral-spatial feature decoupled alignment for hyperspectral imagery classification. There is no match in field, application domain, methods, or research goals.

title: Real-Time Evaluation of Autonomous Systems under Adversarial Attacks
summary:
Most evaluations of autonomous driving policies under adversarial conditions are conducted in simulation, due to cost efficiency and the absence of physical risk. However, purely virtual testing fails to capture structural inconsistencies, supervision constraints, and state-representation effects that arise in real-world data and fundamentally shape policy robustness. This work presents an offline trajectory-learning and adversarial robustness evaluation framework grounded in real-world intersection driving data. Within a controlled data contract, we train and compare three trajectory-learning paradigms: Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP)-based Behavior Cloning (BC), Transformer-based object-tokenized BC, and inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) formulated within a Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (GAIL) framework. Models are evaluated using Average Displacement Error (ADE) and Final Displacement Error (FDE).
  Inference-time robustness is assessed by subjecting trained policies to gradient-based adversarial perturbations across multiple intersection scenarios, yielding a structured robustness evaluation matrix. Results show that state-structure design and architectural inductive biases critically influence adversarial stability, leading to markedly different robustness profiles despite comparable nominal prediction accuracy (ADE < 0.08). Inference-time Projected Gradient Descent (PGD) attacks induce final displacement errors of up to approximately 8 meters. The proposed framework establishes a scalable benchmark for studying offline trajectory learning and adversarial robustness in real-world autonomous driving settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于真实世界交叉口数据的离线轨迹学习和对抗鲁棒性评估框架，训练比较了MLP-BC、Transformer-BC和GAIL-IRL三种范式，发现状态结构设计和架构归纳偏置对抗稳定性有显著影响，PGD攻击可达8米FDE。
AI.motivation: 大多数自动驾驶策略的对抗性评估在仿真环境中进行，因为成本低且无物理风险。但纯虚拟测试无法捕捉真实世界中出现的数据结构不一致、监督约束和状态表示效应等问题。现有方法缺乏基于真实世界数据的离线轨迹学习和对抗鲁棒性评估框架。

AI.conclusion: 该框架为研究真实自动驾驶场景中的离线轨迹学习和对抗鲁棒性建立了一个可扩展的基准，揭示了架构选择对安全关键场景下策略稳定性的重要影响。

title: Enhancing Self-Supervised Talking Head Forgery Detection via a Training-Free Dual-System Framework
summary: Supervised talking head forgery detection faces severe generalization challenges due to the continuous evolution of generators. By reducing reliance on generator-specific forgery patterns, self-supervised detectors offer stronger cross-generator robustness. However, existing research has mainly focused on building stronger detectors, while the discriminative capacity of trained detectors remains insufficiently exploited. In particular, for score-based self-supervised detectors, the limited discriminative ability on hard cases is often reflected in unreliable anomaly ordering, leaving room for further refinement. Motivated by this observation, we draw inspiration from the dual-system theory of human cognition and propose a Training-Free Dual-System (TFDS) framework to further exploit the latent discriminative capacity of existing score-based self-supervised detectors. TFDS treats anomaly-like scores as the basis of System-1, using lightweight threshold-based routing to partition samples into confident and uncertain subsets. System-2 then revisits only the uncertain subset, performing fine-grained evidence-guided reasoning to refine the relative ordering of ambiguous samples within the original score distribution. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements across datasets and perturbation settings, with the gains arising mainly from corrected ordering within the uncertain subset. These findings show that existing self-supervised talking head forgery detectors still contain underexploited discriminative cues that can be effectively unlocked through training-free dual-system reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种训练无关的双系统（TFDS）框架，用于增强自监督说话头像伪造检测器的判别能力。该方法受人类认知双系统理论启发，将异常分数作为系统1的基础，通过轻量级阈值路由将样本分为置信集和不确定集，然后对不确定样本进行细粒度的证据引导推理来细化排序。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督检测器在跨生成器鲁棒性方面存在不足，特别是基于分数的检测器在困难样本上的判别能力有限，异常排序不可靠，需要进一步挖掘潜在判别能力。
AI.method: 提出训练无关双系统框架：系统1基于异常分数进行阈值路由，将样本划分为置信集和不确定集；系统2仅对不确定集进行细粒度证据引导推理，重新排序模糊样本。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和扰动设置下实现一致性改进，收益主要来自对不确定集内排序的修正。
AI.conclusion: 现有的自监督说话头像伪造检测器仍包含未被充分利用的判别线索，可以通过训练无关的双系统推理有效释放。

title: MASRA: MLLM-Assisted Semantic-Relational Consistent Alignment for Video Temporal Grounding
summary: Video Temporal Grounding (VTG) faces a cross-modal semantic gap that often leads to background features being incorrectly aligned with the query, while directly matching the query to moments results in insufficient discriminability and consistency of temporal semantics. To address this issue, we propose MLLM-Assisted Semantic-Relational Consistent Alignment (MASRA), a training-time MLLM-based optimization framework for VTG. MASRA leverages an MLLM during training to produce two forms of textual priors, namely event-level descriptions with temporal spans and clip-level captions, and instantiates two MLLM-assisted alignments. Event Semantic Temporal Alignment (ESTA) aligns temporal context with event semantics to explicitly strengthen the correspondence between semantics and temporal events and improve span-level separability. Local Relational Consistency Alignment (LRCA) constructs a textual relation matrix derived from clip-level captions and aligns it with the temporal feature similarity matrix in the model, enhancing temporal consistency while capturing local structural information. MASRA includes two simple supporting modules, semantic-guided enhancement and second-order relational attention, to better utilize the learned semantic context and relational structure. Moreover, we introduce Decoupled Alignment Interaction (DAI) with a context-aware codebook to adaptively absorb query-irrelevant semantics and alleviate the cross-modal gap. The MLLM is only invoked during training and is not used at inference. Extensive experiments show that MASRA outperforms existing methods, and ablation studies validate its effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 针对视频时序定位(VTG)中跨模态语义差距问题,提出MASRA框架,利用多模态大语言模型(MLLM)在训练时生成事件级描述和片段级字幕两种文本先验,实现事件语义时序对齐(ESTA)和局部关系一致性对齐(LRCA),增强时序语义的区分度和一致性。
AI.motivation: 视频时序定位面临跨模态语义差距问题,导致背景特征与查询错误对齐,而直接匹配查询与时刻导致时序语义区分度和一致性不足。
AI.method: MASRA框架包含:1)事件语义时序对齐(ESTA):将时序上下文与事件语义对齐,增强语义与时序事件的对应关系;2)局部关系一致性对齐(LRCA):从片段级字幕构建文本关系矩阵,与时序特征相似度矩阵对齐;3)语义引导增强和二阶关系注意力两个支持模块;4)解耦对齐交互(DAI)配合上下文感知码本自适应吸收查询无关语义。
AI.result: 实验表明MASRA优于现有方法,消融实验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过MLLM在训练时生成文本先验并实施双重对齐策略,可有效弥合跨模态语义差距,提升视频时序定位的准确性和鲁棒性,且推理时无需MLLM。

title: Where Paths Split: Localized, Calibrated Control of Moral Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models often display heterogeneous moral preferences across settings. We study inference-time steering toward a desired ethical framework while preserving general competence. We present Convergent-Divergent Routing, which traces and edits minimal branch points inside transformer blocks where ethical-framework-related pathways first converge and then diverge. Gating non-target branches at these loci blocks the downstream propagation while leaving upstream computations intact. We find that this intervention alone increases targeted ethical-framework reasoning. To achieve fine-grained control, we adapt Common Spatial Patterns to the residual stream and extract, for each branch-point layer, a pair of directions that discriminate between utilitarian and deontological frameworks. We then introduce Dual Logit Calibration, a closed-form, minimum-$\ell_2$-norm update that moves the residual within this two-dimensional subspace so the resulting directional projections align with user-specified preference weights. Experiments on real-life moral dilemmas show that our method reliably achieves preference calibration and largely preserves general capabilities, outperforming recent baselines while providing an interpretable mechanism.

AI.tldr: 研究大型语言模型在推理时如何被引导向特定伦理框架（功利主义或义务论），提出Convergent-Divergent Routing和Dual Logit Calibration方法，通过编辑transformer内部路径分支点和校准残差来实现道德偏好校准
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在不同设置下表现出异质的道德偏好，需要在推理时引导向期望的伦理框架，同时保持模型的一般能力
AI.method: 提出Convergent-Divergent Routing方法，追踪并编辑transformer块内的最小分支点，在伦理框架相关路径首次汇聚和发散的地点进行门控控制；adapt Common Spatial Patterns提取能够区分功利主义和义务论框架的方向对；引入Dual Logit Calibration进行封闭形式的最小ℓ2范数更新
AI.result: 该方法单独使用即可增加目标伦理框架推理；在真实道德困境上的实验表明方法可靠地实现偏好校准并很大程度上保持一般能力，优于最近的基线方法，同时提供可解释的机制
AI.conclusion: 成功实现对LLM道德偏好的细粒度控制，在保持模型能力的同时实现偏好校准

title: GRPO-TTA: Test-Time Visual Tuning for Vision-Language Models via GRPO-Driven Reinforcement Learning
summary: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has recently shown strong performance in post-training large language models and vision-language models. It raises a question of whether the GRPO also significantly promotes the test-time adaptation (TTA) of vision language models. In this paper, we propose Group Relative Policy Optimization for Test-Time Adaptation (GRPO-TTA), which adapts GRPO to the TTA setting by reformulating class-specific prompt prediction as a group-wise policy optimization problem. Specifically, we construct output groups by sampling top-K class candidates from CLIP similarity distributions, enabling probability-driven optimization without access to ground-truth labels. Moreover, we design reward functions tailored to test-time adaptation, including alignment rewards and dispersion rewards, to guide effective visual encoder tuning. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that GRPO-TTA consistently outperforms existing test-time adaptation methods, with notably larger performance gains under natural distribution shifts.

AI.tldr: GRPO-TTA是一种将组相对策略优化应用于视觉语言模型测试时间适应的方法，通过构建输出组和设计针对TTA的奖励函数来实现无需ground-truth标签的视觉编码器调优。

AI.method: 1. 将类特定提示预测重新表述为群体策略优化问题；2. 通过从CLIP相似性分布中采样前K个类别候选者来构建输出组，实现无ground-truth标签的概率驱动优化；3. 设计针对测试时间适应的奖励函数，包括对齐奖励和分散奖励。
AI.result: 在各种基准测试中始终优于现有的测试时间适应方法，在自然分布转移下表现出显著更大的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: GRPO可以有效应用于视觉语言模型的测试时间适应，为TTA提供了一种新的优化范式。

title: Self-Improvement for Fast, High-Quality Plan Generation
summary: Generative models trained on synthetic plan data are a promising approach to generalized planning. Recent work has focused on finding any valid plan, rather than a high-quality solution. We address the challenge of producing high-quality plans, a computationally hard problem, in sub-exponential time. First, we demonstrate that, given optimal data, a decoder-only transformer can generate high-quality plans for unseen problem instances. Second, we show how to self-improve an initial model trained on sub-optimal data. Each round of self-improvement combines multiple model calls with graph search to generate improved plans, used for model fine-tuning. An experimental study on four domains: Blocksworld, Logistics, Labyrinth, and Sokoban, shows on average a 30% reduction in plan length over the source symbolic planner, with over 80% of plans being optimal, where the optimum is known. Plan quality is further improved by inference-time search. The model's latency scales sub-exponentially in contrast to the satisficing and optimal symbolic planners to which we compare. Together, these results suggest that self-improvement with generative models offers a scalable approach for high-quality plan generation.

AI.tldr: 研究使用生成模型（解码器-only transformer）在合成规划数据上生成高质量计划，通过自改进方法提升模型性能，在Blocksworld、Logistics、Labyrinth和Sokoban四个领域实现平均30%计划长度减少。
AI.motivation: 当前生成模型研究仅关注找到任何有效计划，而高质量计划生成是计算难题；挑战在于如何在亚指数时间内生成高质量解决方案。

AI.conclusion: 自改进与生成模型结合为高质量计划生成提供了一种可扩展方法。

title: AdapShot: Adaptive Many-Shot In-Context Learning with Semantic-Aware KV Cache Reuse
summary: Many-Shot In-Context Learning (ICL) has emerged as a promising paradigm, leveraging extensive examples to unlock the reasoning potential of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, existing methods typically rely on a predetermined, fixed number of shots. This static approach often fails to adapt to the varying difficulty of different queries, leading to either insufficient context or interference from noise. Furthermore, the prohibitive computational and memory costs of long contexts severely limit Many-Shot's feasibility. To address the above limitations, we propose AdapShot, which dynamically optimizes shot counts and leverages KV cache reuse for efficient inference. Specifically, we design a probe-based evaluation mechanism that utilizes output entropy to determine the optimal number of shots. To bypass the redundant prefilling computation during both the probing and inference phases, we incorporate a semantics-aware KV cache reuse strategy. Within this reuse strategy, to address positional encoding incompatibilities, we introduce a decoupling and re-encoding method that enables the flexible reordering of cached key-value pairs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AdapShot achieves an average performance gain of around 10% and a 4.64x speedup compared to state-of-the-art DBSA.

AI.tldr: AdapShot是一种动态优化少样本数量并利用KV缓存重用实现高效推理的方法，通过基于输出熵的探测评估机制来确定最佳示例数量。
AI.motivation: 现有Many-Shot ICL方法依赖固定数量的示例，无法适应不同查询的难度差异；长上下文的计算和内存成本过高限制了方法的可行性。
AI.method: 设计基于探测的评估机制利用输出熵确定最优示例数量；引入语义感知的KV缓存重用策略绕过冗余预填充计算；提出解耦和重新编码方法解决位置编码不兼容问题。
AI.result: 与SOTA DBSA相比，AdapShot实现平均约10%的性能提升和4.64x的加速。
AI.conclusion: AdapShot能够根据查询难度动态调整示例数量，在保持推理效率的同时显著提升性能。

title: MK-ResRecon: Multi-Kernel Residual Framework for Texture-Aware 3D MRI Refinement from Sparse 2D Slices
summary: Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) acquisition remains a time-intensive and patient-straining process, as prolonged scan dura- tions increase the likelihood of motion artifacts, which degrade image quality and frequently require repeated scans. To address these chal- lenges, we propose a novel framework with two models MK-ResRecon and IdentityRefineNet3D to reconstruct high-fidelity 3D MRI volumes from sparsely sampled 2D slices-requiring only 12.5% of the axial slices for full resolution 3D reconstruction. MK-ResRecon predicts missing in- termediate 2D slices using a multi-kernel texture-aware loss, preserving fine anatomical details. IdentityRefineNet3D refines the predicted slices and the original sparse slices as a single 3D volume to obtain a smooth anatomical structure. We train the models on a large T1-sequence POST- contrast brain MRI dataset and evaluate on a large heterogeneous brain MRI cohort. The work provides accurate, hallucination-free, generaliz- able and clinically validated framework for 3D MRI reconstruction from highly sparse inputs and enables a clinically viable path towards faster and more patient-friendly MRI imaging.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的框架，使用MK-ResRecon和IdentityRefineNet3D两个模型从稀疏采样的2D切片重建高保真3D MRI体积，仅需12.5%的轴向切片即可完成全分辨率3D重建。
AI.motivation: MRI采集耗时且会给患者带来不适，长时间扫描会增加运动伪影的风险，导致图像质量下降并需要重复扫描。
AI.method: MK-ResConc使用多核纹理感知损失预测缺失的中间2D切片，保留精细解剖细节；IdentityRefineNet3D将预测切片和原始稀疏切片作为单一3D体积进行细化，获得平滑解剖结构。模型在大型T1序列对比后脑MRI数据集上训练，并在大型异构脑MRI队列中进行评估。

AI.conclusion: 提出的框架成功实现了从仅12.5%轴向切片的稀疏采样重建高保真3D MRI体积，具有准确、无幻觉、可推广的特性，已过临床验证。

title: Learning Discriminative Signed Distance Functions from Multi-scale Level-of-detail Features for 3D Anomaly Detection
summary: Detecting anomalies from 3D point clouds has received increasing attention in the field of computer vision, with some group-based or point-based methods achieving impressive results in recent years. However, learning accurate point-wise representations for 3D anomaly detection faces great challenges due to the large scale and sparsity of point clouds. In this study, a surface-based method is proposed for 3D anomaly detection, which learns a discriminative signed distance function using multi-scale level-of-detail features. We first present a Noisy Points Generation (NPG) module to generate different types of noise, thereby facilitating the learning of discriminative features by exposing abnormal points. Then, we introduce a Multi-scale Level-of-detail Feature (MLF) module to capture multi-scale information from a point cloud, which provides both fine-grained local and coarse-grained global feature information. Finally, we design an Implicit Surface Discrimination (ISD) module that leverages the extracted multi-scale features to learn an implicit surface representation of point clouds, which effectively trains a signed distance function to distinguish between abnormal and normal points. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves an average object-level AUROC of 92.1\% and 85.9\% on the Anomaly-ShapeNet and Real3D-AD datasets, outperforming the current best approach by 2.1\% and 3.6\%, respectively. Codes are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/DLF-3AD-DA61.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于表面的3D点云异常检测方法，通过学习判别性符号距离函数来区分正常与异常点。该方法包含三个核心模块：噪声点生成(NPG)模块生成不同类型噪声以暴露异常点；多尺度细节特征(MLF)模块捕捉细粒度局部和粗粒度全局信息；隐式表面判别(ISD)模块利用多尺度特征学习隐式表面表示。在Anomaly-ShapeNet和Real3D-AD数据集上分别达到92.1%和85.9%的对象级AUROC，较最优方法提升2.1%和3.6%。
AI.motivation: 3D点云异常检测面临学习精确点级表示的挑战，主要原因是点云数据规模大且稀疏。现有基于组或基于点的方法难以有效处理此问题。
AI.method: 提出基于表面的方法，包含三个创新模块：1)NPG模块生成不同类型噪声，帮助学习判别性特征；2)MLF模块从点云中提取多尺度信息，同时包含细粒度局部和粗粒度全局特征；3)ISD模块利用多尺度特征学习隐式表面表示，通过训练符号距离函数区分正常与异常点。
AI.result: 在Anomaly-ShapeNet数据集上达到92.1% AUROC，在Real3D-AD数据集上达到85.9% AUROC，分别较当前最优方法提升2.1%和3.6%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过表面表示和符号距离函数有效解决了3D点云异常检测的难题，在两个基准数据集上均取得最先进的性能表现。

The application domain (industrial anomaly detection vs human motion generation), the goal (detecting defects vs generating temporal human motions), and the data type (static point clouds vs video/motion sequences) are entirely different. While it uses signed distance functions and point cloud processing, these are applied in a completely unrelated domain with no relevance to the pain points about extracting motion from video, VLM-based quality control, or temporal motion consistency.

title: Mantis: Mamba-native Tuning is Efficient for 3D Point Cloud Foundation Models
summary: Pre-trained 3D point cloud foundation models (PFMs) have demonstrated strong transferability across diverse downstream tasks. However, full fine-tuning these models is computationally expensive and storage-intensive. Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) offers a promising alternative, but existing PEFT approaches are primarily designed for Transformer-based backbones and rely on token-level prompting or feature transformation. Mamba-based backbones introduce a granularity mismatch between token-level adaptation and state-level sequence dynamics. Consequently, straightforward transfer of existing PEFT approaches to frozen Mamba backbones leads to substantial accuracy degradation and unstable optimization. To address this issue, we propose Mantis, the first Mamba-native PEFT framework for 3D PFMs. Specifically, a State-Aware Adapter (SAA) is introduced to inject lightweight task-conditioned control signals into selective state-space updates, enabling state-level adaptation while keeping the pre-trained backbone frozen. Moreover, different valid point cloud serializations are regularized by Dual-Serialization Consistency Distillation (DSCD), thereby reducing serialization-induced instability. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our Mantis achieves competitive performance with only about 5% trainable parameters. Our code is available at https://github.com/gzhhhhhhh/Mantis.

AI.tldr: MantIs是首个针对3D点云基础模型的Mamba原生参数高效微调框架，通过状态感知适配器在状态空间层面实现轻量级任务适应，同时使用双序列化一致性蒸馏减少序列化导致的不稳定性，仅用约5%的可训练参数即达到竞争性能。
AI.motivation: 现有PEFT方法主要针对Transformer骨干设计，存在token-level适配与state-level序列动态的粒度不匹配问题，导致直接迁移到冻结的Mamba骨干时准确率显著下降且优化不稳定。
AI.method: 提出状态感知适配器(SAA)向选择性状态空间更新中注入轻量级任务条件控制信号，实现状态级适配；同时引入双序列化一致性蒸馏(DSCD)正则化不同点云序列化。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上仅用约5%可训练参数达到竞争性能。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个针对3D PFMs的Mamba原生PEFT框架，解决了粒度不匹配和序列化不稳定问题。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D Point Cloud processing using Mamba state-space models, which is a completely different application domain from 3D Human Motion Generation. While both deal with 3D data, the target objects (point clouds vs. human motion/skeletons), the representation methods (Mamba/SSM vs. SMPL/skeleton-based), and the downstream tasks (point cloud analysis vs. motion generation) are entirely different. This paper has no relevance to the research profile's pain points about video-to-motion extraction, VLM-based quality control, or temporal motion consistency.

title: OracleProto: A Reproducible Framework for Benchmarking LLM Native Forecasting via Knowledge Cutoff and Temporal Masking
summary: Large language models are moving from static text generators toward real-world decision-support systems, where forecasting is a composite capability that links information gathering, evidence integration, situational judgment, and action-oriented decision making. This capability is in broad demand across finance, policy, industry, and scientific research, yet its evaluation remains difficult: live benchmarks evaluate forecasts before answers exist, making them the cleanest way to measure forecasting ability, but they expire once events resolve; retrospective benchmarks are reproducible, but they cannot reliably distinguish genuine forecasting from facts a model may have already learned during pretraining. Prompting models to "pretend not to know" cannot replace a genuine knowledge boundary. We propose OracleProto, a reproducible framework for evaluating LLM native forecasting capability. OracleProto reconstructs resolved events into time-bounded forecasting samples by combining model-cutoff-aligned sample admission, tool-level temporal masking, content-level leakage detection, discrete answer normalization, and hierarchical scoring. Instantiated on a FutureX-Past-derived dataset with six contemporary LLMs, OracleProto distinguishes forecasting quality, sampling stability, and cost efficiency under controlled information boundaries, while reducing residual leakage to the $1\%$ level, an order of magnitude below tool-only temporal filtering. OracleProto turns LLM forecasting from one-off evaluation into an auditable, reusable, and trainable dataset-level capability, providing a unified interface for fair cross-model comparison and a controlled signal source for downstream SFT and RL. Code and data are available at https://github.com/MaYiding/OracleProto and https://huggingface.co/datasets/MaYiding/OracleProto.

AI.tldr: 提出OracleProto框架，用于评估大型语言模型的原生预测能力，通过重建已解决事件为有时间限制的预测样本来解决LLM预测评估的难题。
AI.motivation: LLM正从静态文本生成转向现实决策支持系统，预测能力急需评估，但现有基准存在缺陷：实时基准在事件解决前评估但会过期，回顾性基准虽可复现但无法区分真实预测与预训练已学知识。
AI.method: OracleProto通过模型截断点对齐的样本准入、工具级时间掩码、内容级泄漏检测、离散答案规范化和分层评分来重建已解决事件。在FutureX-Past衍生数据集上对六个当代LLM进行实例化测试。
AI.result: OracleProto能够区分预测质量、采样稳定性和成本效率，将残余泄漏降至1%，比纯工具时间过滤低一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: OracleProto将LLM预测从一次性评估转变为可审计、可复用、可训练的数据集级能力，提供统一的公平跨模型比较接口和下游SFT和RL的受控信号源。

relevance_reason: This paper is about benchmarking LLM native forecasting capabilities using knowledge cutoff and temporal masking - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is NLP/AI evaluation, not graphics or motion generation. It does not address any of the pain points (2D-3D domain gap, VLM for motion quality control, temporal consistency in motion) nor does it use any relevant methods (diffusion for motion, SMPL, video generation models). This is an entirely different field.

title: VL-SAM-v3: Memory-Guided Visual Priors for Open-World Object Detection
summary: Open-world object detection aims to localize and recognize objects beyond a fixed closed-set label space. It is commonly divided into two categories, i.e., open-vocabulary detection, which assumes a predefined category list at test time, and open-ended detection, which requires generating candidate categories during the inference. Existing methods rely primarily on coarse textual semantics and parametric knowledge, which often provide insufficient visual evidence for fine-grained appearance variation, rare categories, and cluttered scenes. In this paper, we propose VL-SAM-v3, a unified framework that augments open-world detection with retrieval-grounded external visual memory. Specifically, once candidate categories are available, VL-SAM-v3 retrieves relevant visual prototypes from a non-parametric memory bank and transforms them into two complementary visual priors, i.e., sparse priors for instance-level spatial anchoring and dense priors for class-aware local context. These priors are integrated with the original detection prompts via Memory-Guided Prompt Refinement, enabling a shared retrieval-and-refinement mechanism that supports open-vocabulary and open-ended inference.Extensive zero-shot experiments on LVIS show that VL-SAM-v3 consistently improves detection performance under both open-vocabulary and open-ended inference, with particularly strong gains on rare categories.Moreover, experiments with a stronger open-vocabulary detector (i.e., SAM3) validate the generality of the proposed retrieval-and-refinement mechanism.

AI.tldr: 开放世界目标检测论文，提出VL-SAM-v3框架，通过检索外部视觉记忆增强检测性能，特别在稀有类别上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有开放世界检测方法依赖粗粒度文本语义，对细粒度外观变化、稀有类别和杂乱场景提供视觉证据不足。
AI.method: 提出VL-SAM-v3统一框架：1)从非参数记忆库检索视觉原型；2)转换为两类视觉先验(稀疏先验用于空间锚定，密集先验用于局部上下文)；3)通过记忆引导提示细化与检测提示集成
AI.result: 在LVIS上零样本实验表明：开放词汇和开放端点推理下检测性能持续提升，稀有类别增益尤为显著；SAM3验证了检索-细化机制通用性
AI.conclusion: VL-SAM-v3通过视觉记忆和提示细化机制有效增强开放世界检测，为开放词汇和开放端点推理提供了统一解决方案

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about open-world object detection in images using visual memory retrieval, while the research profile is about 3D human motion generation. Even though both use VLMs, the purpose is fundamentally different - object detection vs. motion generation. The paper doesn't address any pain points related to extracting 3D motion from 2D video, domain gap bridging for motion space, or temporal consistency in motion generation.

title: First Shape, Then Meaning: Efficient Geometry and Semantics Learning for Indoor Reconstruction
summary: Neural Surface Reconstruction has become a standard methodology for indoor 3D reconstruction, with Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) proving particularly effective for representing scene geometry. A variety of applications require a detailed understanding of the scene context, driving the need for object-level semantic signals. While recent methods successfully integrate semantic labels, they often inherit the slow training time and limited scalability of multi-SDF learning. In this paper, we introduce FSTM, a unified approach for learning geometry and semantics through a two-step process: a geometry warm-up using RGB inputs and geometric cues, followed by semantic field estimation. By first optimising geometry without semantic supervision, we observe substantial improvements compared to the standard joint optimisation. Rather than relying on specialised modules or complex multi-SDF designs, FSTM shows that a streamlined formulation is sufficient to achieve strong geometric and semantic reconstructions. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world indoor datasets show that our method outperforms multi-SDF approaches. It trains 2.3x faster on Replica, improves robustness to real-world imperfections on ScanNet++, and achieves higher recall by recovering the surfaces of more objects in the scene. The code will be made available at https://remichierchia.github.io/FSTM.

AI.tldr: FSTM是一种统一的神经表面重建方法，通过两步过程学习几何和语义：首先是使用RGB输入和几何线索进行几何预热，然后进行语义场估计。实验表明，该方法在Replica上训练速度快2.3倍，在ScanNet++上对真实世界缺陷更具鲁棒性，并实现了更高的目标召回率。
AI.motivation: 现有神经表面重建方法虽然能成功集成语义标签，但继承了多SDF学习的慢训练时间和有限可扩展性问题，需要一种既能保持高效训练又能获得良好几何和语义重建效果的统一方法。
AI.method: 提出两阶段方法：1)使用RGB输入和几何线索进行几何预热优化；2)进行语义场估计。不依赖专门的模块或复杂的多SDF设计，通过先优化几何而不进行语义监督来实现改进。
AI.result: 在合成和真实室内数据集上的实验表明：1)在Replica数据集上训练速度快2.3倍；2)在ScanNet++上对真实世界缺陷更加鲁棒；3)通过恢复场景中更多物体的表面，实现了更高的召回率。
AI.conclusion: FSTM证明，简洁的 formulation（ formulations：公式化表示）足以实现强大的几何和语义重建效果，优于现有的多SDF方法。

relevance_reason: 完全无关的领域。该论文是关于室内3D场景重建（neural surface reconstruction），而研究档案是关于3D人体动作生成。应用领域完全不同：该论文处理室内场景几何重建（Replica、ScanNet++数据集），而档案专注于人体动作生成、视频到动作转换、SMPL/骨架表示、时间一致性等。该论文使用神经SDF方法进行场景重建，与扩散模型动作生成、视频生成模型等方法完全不同，也未解决任何档案中提到的痛点（2D视频到3D动作提取、VLM质量控制、时间一致性等）。

title: Say the Mission, Execute the Swarm: Agent-Enhanced LLM Reasoning in the Web-of-Drones
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures. This paper has been accepted for presentation at the 27th IEEE International Symposium on a World of Wireless, Mobile and Multimedia Networks (WoWMoM 2026)
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly explored as high-level reasoning engines for cyber-physical systems, yet their application to real-time UAV swarm management remains challenging due to heterogeneous interfaces, limited grounding, and the need for long-running closed-loop execution. This paper presents a mission-agnostic, agent-enhanced LLM framework for UAV swarm control, where users express mission objectives in natural language and the system autonomously executes them through grounded, real-time interactions. The proposed architecture combines an LLM-based Agent Core with a Model Context Protocol (MCP) gateway and a Web-of-Drones abstraction based on W3C Web of Things (WoT) standards. By exposing drones, sensors, and services as standardized WoT Things, the framework enables structured tool-based interaction, continuous state observation, and safe actuation without relying on code generation. We evaluate the framework using ArduPilot-based simulation across four swarm missions and six state-of-the-art LLMs. Results show that, despite strong reasoning abilities, current general-purpose LLMs still struggle to achieve reliable execution - even for simple swarm tasks - when operating without explicit grounding and execution support. Task-specific planning tools and runtime guardrails substantially improve robustness, while token consumption alone is not indicative of execution quality or reliability.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个任务无关的、基于Agent增强的LLM框架用于无人机蜂群控制，用户可以用自然语言表达任务目标，系统通过基于标准的Web of Things架构进行 grounding 的实时交互执行。
AI.motivation: LLM在无人机蜂群管理中应用面临异构接口、有限 grounding 和长时间闭环执行的挑战。
AI.method: 结合LLM Agent Core、MCP网关和基于W3C WoT标准的Web-of-Drones抽象层，将无人机、传感器和服务暴露为标准化的WoT Things，实现结构化工具交互、持续状态观察和安全执行。
AI.result: 基于ArduPilot仿真评估4个蜂群任务和6个SOTA LLMs，尽管LLM有强推理能力，无显式grounding和执行支持时仍难以可靠执行简单任务。任务特定规划工具和运行时guardrails显著提高鲁棒性，token消耗不反映执行质量。
AI.conclusion: 当前通用LLM在无人机蜂群控制中需要任务特定工具和运行时guardrails才能实现可靠执行，token消耗不是可靠性的有效指标。

relevance_reason: 完全无关的论文。该研究是关于无人机蜂群控制（robotics/control systems），而研究档案要求的是计算机图形学/3D人体运动生成（computer graphics / 3D human motion generation）。两者的应用领域完全不同：前者涉及LLM Agent、无人机控制、Web-of-Things架构；后者涉及扩散模型、视频生成、SMPL骨架表示、VLM质量控制等。该论文不使用任何研究档案中提到的核心方法（扩散运动生成、SMPL表示、视频生成模型等），也不是在同一应用领域。因此相关性为0。

title: ScrapMem: A Bio-inspired Framework for On-device Personalized Agent Memory via Optical Forgetting
summary: Long-term personalized memory for LLM agents is challenging on resource-limited edge devices due to high storage costs and multimodal complexity. To address this, we propose ScrapMem, a framework that integrates multimodal data into "Scrapbook Page." ScrapMem introduces Optical Forgetting, an optical compression mechanism that progressively reduces the resolution of older memories, lowering storage cost while suppressing low-value details. To maintain semantic consistency, we construct an Episodic Memory Graph (EM-Graph) that organizes key events into a causal-temporal structure. Extensive experiments on the multimodal ATM-Bench showcase that ScrapMem provides three main benefits: (1) strong performance, achieving a new state-of-the-art with a 51.0% Joint@10 score; (2) high storage efficiency, reducing memory usage by up to 93% via optical forgetting; and (3) improved recall, increasing Recall@10 to 70.3% through structured aggregation. ScrapMem offers an effective and storage-efficient solution for on-device long-term memory in multimodal LLM agents.

AI.tldr: 提出ScrapMem框架，解决边缘设备上LLM智能体长期个性化记忆的存储成本和 Multimodal 复杂性挑战，通过"剪贴簿页面"集成多模态数据。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的边缘设备上，为LLM智能体提供长期个性化记忆面临高存储成本和多模态复杂性的双重挑战。
AI.method: ScrapMem框架包含两个核心创新：(1)光学遗忘(Optical Forgetting)机制，逐步降低旧记忆的分辨率以降低存储成本；(2)情景记忆图(EM-Graph)将关键事件组织为因果-时序结构以保持语义一致性。
AI.result: 在多模态ATM-Bench上实现：Joint@10得分51.0%达到新SOTA；通过光学遗忘存储节省高达93%；通过结构化聚合Recall@10提升至70.3%。
AI.conclusion: ScrapMem为多模态LLM智能体的设备端长期记忆提供了有效且存储高效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agent memory management on edge devices using optical forgetting mechanisms - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different: this paper deals with text/AI agent memory while the research profile focuses on extracting 3D human motion from 2D video using diffusion models, SMPL representations, and video generation models. No alignment with any pain points or methods.

title: MHPR: Multidimensional Human Perception and Reasoning Benchmark for Large Vision-Languate Models
summary: Multidimensional human understanding is essential for real-world applications such as film analysis and virtual digital humans, yet current LVLM benchmarks largely focus on single-task settings and lack fine-grained, human-centric evaluation. In this work, we introduce MHPR, a comprehensive benchmark for joint perception-reasoning over human-centric scenes spanning individual, multi-person, and human-object interaction dimensions. MHPR comprises a multi-level data design-Captioned Raw Data (C-RD), Supervised Fine-Tuning Data (SFT-D), Reinforcement Learning Data (RL-D), and Test Data (T-D)-together with an automated caption/VQA generation pipeline (ACVG) that performs category-wise attribute decomposition, attribute-specific rewriting, and multi-model voting to ensure high-quality, scalable annotations. We evaluate state-of-the-art vision-language models on fine-grained attributes (appearance, clothing, pose, parts) and high-level semantics (social relations, action semantics, spatial relations, intent and functionality). Our findings show that: 1) format-aligned SFT data substantially improves instruction following and stability; 2) challenge-focused RL data derived from bad-case analysis further enhances perception and reasoning on difficult instances; and 3) training Qwen2.5-VL-7B with MHPR yields significant gains, achieving near-parity with considerably larger models. We release ACVG and MHPR to facilitate reproducible, extensible research on human-centric perception and reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MHPR，一个全面的人本中心场景感知推理联合评估基准，包含多层次数据设计和自动化标注生成pipeline。基准涵盖个体、多人和人物交互维度，评估细粒度属性和高级语义。实验表明格式化SFT数据和RL数据能显著提升模型性能，使用MHPR训练的7B模型能达到与更大模型接近的效果。
AI.motivation: 当前LVLM基准测试主要关注单一任务设置，缺乏细粒度、以人为中心的评估。现实应用如电影分析和虚拟数字人类需要多维度的人类理解能力。
AI.method: 构建了多层次数据设计(C-RD、SFT-D、RL-D、T-D)，提出自动化caption/VQA生成pipeline(ACVG)实现类别属性分解、属性重写和多模型投票。在细粒度属性(外观、服装、姿态、部件)和高级语义(社会关系、动作语义、空间关系、意图功能性)两个层面对vision-language模型进行评估。
AI.result: 1) 格式化对齐的SFT数据显著提升指令跟随和稳定性；2) 基于bad-case分析的challenge-focused RL数据进一步增强困难实例上的感知推理；3) 使用MHPR训练的Qwen2.5-VL-7B取得与更大模型接近的性能。
AI.conclusion: MHPR benchmark and ACVG pipeline能够实现可扩展、高质量的标注生成，为人本中心感知与推理任务提供全面的评估框架。实验表明格式化对齐的SFT数据和基于bad-case分析的RL数据能够显著提升模型的指令跟随能力、感知推理性能。使用MHPR训练的Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型能够取得接近更大规模模型的性能表现。

relevance_reason: The paper is about benchmarking Vision-Language Models for human-centric scene perception (understanding appearance, clothing, pose, social relations in images). While it mentions "virtual digital humans" as a potential application, this is focused on IMAGE UNDERSTANDING, not 3D MOTION GENERATION. The research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation, which requires generating new motion sequences. This paper addresses VLM evaluation for perceiving humans in static scenes, not generating or extracting 3D human motion from video. Different application domain entirely - perception/understanding vs. motion generation.

title: SOAR: Real-Time Joint Optimization of Order Allocation and Robot Scheduling in Robotic Mobile Fulfillment Systems
summary: Robotic Mobile Fulfillment Systems (RMFS) rely on mobile robots for automated inventory transportation, coordinating order allocation and robot scheduling to enhance warehousing efficiency. However, optimizing RMFS is challenging due to strict real-time constraints and the strong coupling of multi-phase decisions. Existing methods either decompose the problem into isolated sub-tasks to guarantee responsiveness at the cost of global optimality, or rely on computationally expensive global optimization models that are unsuitable for dynamic industrial environments. To bridge this gap, we propose SOAR, a unified Deep Reinforcement Learning framework for real-time joint optimization. SOAR transforms order allocation and robot scheduling into a unified process by utilizing soft order allocations as observations. We formulate this as an Event-Driven Markov Decision Process, enabling the agent to perform simultaneous scheduling in response to asynchronous system events. Technically, we employ a Heterogeneous Graph Transformer to encode the warehouse state and integrate phased domain knowledge. Additionally, we incorporate a reward shaping strategy to address sparse feedback in long-horizon tasks. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world industrial datasets, in collaboration with Geekplus, demonstrate that SOAR reduces global makespan by 7.5\% and average order completion time by 15.4\% with sub-100ms latency. Furthermore, sim-to-real deployment confirms its practical viability and significant performance gains in production environments. The code is available at https://github.com/200815147/SOAR.

AI.tldr: SOAR是一种统一的深度强化学习框架,用于解决仓储机器人移动履行系统(RMFS)中订单分配和机器人调度的实时联合优化问题。该方法通过将订单分配和机器人调度转换为统一流程,利用软订单分配作为观察结果,并采用事件驱动的马尔可夫决策过程来响应异步系统事件。实验表明该方法可将全局Makespan减少7.5%,平均订单完成时间减少15.4%,延迟低于100ms。
AI.motivation: RMFS的优化面临两大挑战:严格的实时性约束和多阶段决策的强耦合。现有的方法要么将问题分解为独立的子任务以保证响应速度但牺牲全局最优性,要么依赖计算昂贵的全局优化模型,不适用于动态工业环境。因此需要一种能够在保证实时性的同时实现全局优化的方法。
AI.method:
1.将订单分配和机器人调度问题统一处理,使用软订单分配作为观察
2.将问题建模为事件驱动的马尔可夫决策过程(EDMDP),使智能体能够响应异步系统事件进行同时调度
3.采用异构图Transformer编码仓库状态并整合分阶段领域知识
4.引入奖励塑造策略解决长视野任务中的稀疏反馈问题
AI.result: 在与Geekplus合作进行的大规模合成数据集和真实工业数据集实验中,SOAR将全局Makespan减少7.5%,平均订单完成时间减少15.4%,延迟低于100ms。sim-to-real部署验证了其在生产环境中的实用性和显著性能提升。

title: BFORE: Butterfly-Firefly Optimized Retinex Enhancement for Low-Light Image Quality Improvement
comment: 28 pages, 10 tables, 3 figures. Submitted to ICCK Journal of Image Analysis and Processing (JIAP)
summary: Low-light image enhancement is a fundamental challenge in computer vision and multimedia applications, as images captured under insufficient illumination suffer from poor visibility, low contrast, and color distortion. Existing Retinex-based methods rely on manually tuned parameters that fail to generalize across diverse lighting conditions. This paper proposes BFORE (Butterfly-Firefly Optimized Retinex Enhancement), a novel hybrid metaheuristic-optimized framework that automatically tunes the parameters of a multi-stage Retinex-based pipeline. The proposed method converts the input image to HSV color space and applies Adaptive Gamma Correction with Weighted Distribution (AGCWD) to the luminance channel, followed by adaptive denoising. A Butterfly Optimization Algorithm (BOA) optimizes the Multi-Scale Retinex with Color Restoration (MSRCR) parameters, while a Firefly Algorithm (FA) optimizes the AGCWD and denoising parameters. A hybrid BOA-FA switching strategy dynamically balances global exploration and local exploitation. Experimental evaluation on the LOL benchmark dataset (15 paired test images) demonstrates that BFORE achieves the highest PSNR (17.22 dB) among all traditional enhancement methods, with 20.3% improvement over Histogram Equalization and 17.5% over MSRCR. BFORE produces the most naturally balanced mean brightness (129.97), closest to the ideal mid-tone value. Notably, BFORE outperforms RetinexNet -- a deep learning baseline -- in both PSNR (17.22 vs. 16.77 dB) and SSIM (0.5417 vs. 0.4252) without requiring any training data. The hybrid BOA-FA optimization contributes a 12.3% PSNR improvement and 14.8% SSIM improvement over the unoptimized pipeline.

AI.tldr: BFORE是一种结合蝴蝶优化算法和萤火虫算法的混合元启发式优化框架，用于自动调优多阶段Retinex管道参数，实现低光照图像增强，在LOL数据集上PSNR达到17.22 dB，优于传统方法和深度学习基线RetinexNet。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于Retinex的方法依赖手动调参，无法在多样化的光照条件下推广。需要一种能够自动调参的混合元启发式优化框架来提升低光照图像增强的效果和泛化能力。
AI.method: 该方法将输入图像转换为HSV颜色空间，对亮度通道应用带权重分布的自适应伽马校正(AGCWD)，然后进行自适应去噪。蝴蝶优化算法(BOA)优化多尺度Retinex色彩恢复(MSRCR)参数，而萤火虫算法(FA)优化AGCWD和去噪参数。混合BOA-FA切换策略动态平衡全局探索和局部开发。
AI.result: BFORE在LOL基准数据集上达到最高PSNR (17.22 dB)，比直方图均衡化提高20.3%，比MSRCR提高17.5%。平均亮度(129.97)最接近理想中调值。在PSNR和SSIM上均优于深度学习基线RetinexNet，且无需训练数据。混合BOA-FA优化相比未优化管道提供12.3%的PSNR提升和14.8%的SSIM提升。
AI.conclusion: BFORE是一种有效的低光照图像增强方法，无需训练数据即可实现先进的性能。混合BOA-FA优化策略为传统Retinex管道提供了12.3%的PSNR提升和14.8%的SSIM提升，证明了元启发式优化在图像增强任务中的潜力。

This paper addresses low-light image enhancement using Retinex theory and meta-heuristic optimization (Butterfly/Firefly algorithms). title: Mechanical Conscience: A Mathematical Framework for Dependability of Machine Intelligenc
summary: Distributed collaborative intelligence (DCI), encompassing edge-to-edge architectures, federated learning, transfer learning, and swarm systems, creates environments in which emergent risk is structurally unavoidable: locally correct decisions by individual agents compose into globally unacceptable behavioral trajectories under uncertainty. Existing approaches such as constrained optimization, safe reinforcement learning, and runtime assurance evaluate acceptability at the level of individual actions rather than across behavioral trajectories, and none addresses the multi-participant, uncertainty-laden nature of DCI deployments. This paper introduces mechanical conscience (MC), a novel concept and simplified mathematical framework that operationalizes trajectory-level normative regulation for both single-agent and distributed intelligent systems. Mechanical conscience is defined as a supervisory filter that minimally corrects a baseline policy's actions to reduce cumulative deviation from a normatively admissible region, while accounting for epistemic uncertainty. We introduce associated constructs, conscience score, mechanical guilt, and resonant dependability, that provide an interpretable vocabulary and computable governance signals for this emerging field. Core theoretical properties are established: admissibility equivalence, existence of optimal regulation, and monotonic deviation reduction. Illustrative results demonstrate that MC-regulated agents maintain trajectory-level normative acceptability where conventional controllers drift outside admissible bounds, and that the framework naturally extends to suppress interaction-induced emergent risk in multi-agent DCI settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"机械良知"概念,作为分布式智能系统中轨迹级规范调节的数学框架。该框架通过监督过滤器 minimal 修正智能体的行为,使其保持在规范允许范围内,同时考虑认知不确定性。建立的理论性质包括:可容许性等价、最优规制存在性和单调偏差递减。
AI.motivation: 分布式协同智能(DCI)系统中,局部正确的决策在不确定性下可能组合成全球不可接受的行为轨迹。现有方法仅在个体动作层面评估可接受性,无法处理多参与者和不确定性情境下的DCI部署风险。这是首个从轨迹层面而非动作层面对分布式智能系统进行规范调节的研究。
AI.method: 定义机械良知为监督过滤器,对基线策略的动作进行 minimal 修正以减少累积偏离规范允许区域的距离,同时考虑认知不确定性。引入 Conscience Score、Mechanical Guilt 和 Resonant Dependability 等构造提供可解释的词汇和可计算的治理信号。建立三个核心理论性质:可容许性等价、最优规制存在性和单调偏差递减。
AI.result: MC调节的智能体在轨迹层面保持规范可接受性,而传统控制器会偏离到允许范围外。框架自然扩展到抑制多智能体DCI设置中由交互引起的 emergent risk。MC能够在单智能体和分布式场景中提供轨迹级别的安全保障。
AI.conclusion: 机械良知为分布式智能系统提供了一种新的轨迹级规范调节方法。该框架在理论上建立了三个核心性质,在实践中展示了有效性,为DCI系统的安全治理提供了可解释和可计算的机制。未来的工作可能包括更复杂的场景验证和实际系统部署。

authors: Geert J. L. H. van Leenders
title: DALPHIN: Benchmarking Digital Pathology AI Copilots Against Pathologists on an Open Multicentric Dataset
comment: Our dataset is available at https://zenodo.org/records/18609450 , our code is available at https://github.com/computationalpathologygroup/DALPHIN , and our benchmark is available at https://dalphin.grand-challenge.org/
summary: Foundation models with visual question answering capabilities for digital pathology are emerging. Such unprecedented technology requires independent benchmarking to assess its potential in assisting pathologists in routine diagnostics. We created DALPHIN, the first multicentric open benchmark for pathology AI copilots, comprising 1236 images from 300 cases, spanning 130 rare to common diagnoses, 6 countries, and 14 subspecialties. The DALPHIN design and dataset are introduced alongside a human performance benchmark of 31 pathologists from 10 countries with varying expertise. We report results for two general-purpose (GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro) and one pathology-specific copilot (PathChat+) for sequential and independent answer generation. We observed no statistically significant difference from expert-level performance in four of six tasks for PathChat, 2/6 tasks for Gemini, and 1/6 tasks for GPT. DALPHIN is publicly released with sequestered, indirectly accessible ground truth to foster robust and enduring benchmarking. Data, methods, and the evaluation platform are accessible through dalphin.grand-challenge.org.

AI.tldr: DALPHIN是首个用于评估病理学AI助手的多中心开放基准测试，包含1236张图像、300个病例、130种诊断、来自6个国家的14个亚专科。评估了GPT-5、 Gemini 2.5 Pro和PathChat+三个模型，PathChat在6个任务中4个达到专家水平。
AI.motivation: 数字病理学中的基础模型和视觉问答技术正在兴起，但缺乏独立的基准测试来评估其在常规诊断中协助病理学家的潜力。
AI.method: 创建DALPHIN基准数据集，包含1236张图像和130种诊断；招募31名来自10个国家的病理学家建立人类性能基准；评估两个通用模型（GPT-5、 Gemini 2.5 Pro）和一个病理学专用模型（PathChat+）在顺序和独立答案生成任务上的表现。
AI.result: PathChat在6个任务中4个达到专家水平，Gemini 2.5 Pro在2个任务中达到，GPT-5在1个任务中达到，无统计显著差异。DALPHIN数据集和评估平台已公开释放。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明病理学专用AI助手（PathChat）性能优于通用模型，部分任务可达到专家病理学家水平，为AI辅助病理诊断提供了有价值的基准和方向。

title: Correct Is Not Enough: Training Reasoning Planners with Executor-Grounded Rewards
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has become a common way to improve explicit reasoning in large language models, but final-answer correctness alone does not reveal whether the reasoning trace is faithful, reliable, or useful to the model that consumes it. This outcome-only signal can reinforce traces that are right for the wrong reasons, overstate reasoning gains by rewarding shortcuts, and propagate flawed intermediate states in multi-step systems. To this end, we propose TraceLift, a planner-executor training framework that treats reasoning as a consumable intermediate artifact. During planner training, the planner emits tagged reasoning. A frozen executor turns this reasoning into the final artifact for verifier feedback, while an executor-grounded reward shapes the intermediate trace. This reward multiplies a rubric-based Reasoning Reward Model (RM) score by measured uplift on the same frozen executor, crediting traces that are both high-quality and useful. To make reasoning quality directly learnable, we introduce TRACELIFT-GROUPS, a rubric-annotated reason-only dataset built from math and code seed problems. Each example is a same-problem group containing a high-quality reference trace and multiple plausible flawed traces with localized perturbations that reduce reasoning quality or solution support while preserving task relevance. Extensive experiments on code and math benchmarks show that this executor-grounded reasoning reward improves the two-stage planner-executor system over execution-only training, suggesting that reasoning supervision should evaluate not only whether a trace looks good, but also whether it helps the model that consumes it.

AI.tldr: 提出TraceLift框架，通过将推理视为可消费的中间产物，利用冻结执行器的提升来奖励高质量且有用的推理轨迹，解决仅奖励最终答案正确性导致的推理不可靠问题。
AI.motivation: 当前强化学习仅基于最终答案正确性奖励模型，这无法保证推理轨迹是可信、可靠或有用的。可能强化"因错误原因正确"的轨迹，或通过奖励捷径来夸大推理增益，导致推理中间状态存在缺陷。
AI.method: TraceLift是一个计划者-执行者训练框架。计划者生成带标签的推理，冻结执行器将推理转化为最终产物用于验证器反馈。执行器 grounding奖励将基于规则的推理奖励模型(RM)分数乘以在同一冻结执行器上的 measured uplift，从而奖励高质量且有用的轨迹。同时构建了TRACELIFT-GROUPS数据集，包含同一问题的高质量参考轨迹和多种保持任务相关性的缺陷轨迹。
AI.result: 在代码和数学基准上的广泛实验表明，执行器 grounding的推理奖励比纯执行训练更能改进两阶段计划者-执行者系统。
AI.conclusion: 推理监督不仅应评估推理轨迹看起来是否良好，还应评估它是否有助于消费该推理的模型。

relevance_reason: This paper is about training reasoning planners for code/math tasks using executor-grounded rewards - completely different from Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain (AI reasoning/training methodology) has no overlap with the research profile (3D human motion generation from video). The methods discussed (planner-executor frameworks, reasoning rewards) are entirely unrelated to video generation, diffusion-based motion generation, SMPL representations, or VLM-based quality control for motion generation.

title: EvoLM: Self-Evolving Language Models through Co-Evolved Discriminative Rubrics
summary: Language models encode substantial evaluative knowledge from pretraining, yet current post-training methods rely on external supervision (human annotations, proprietary models, or scalar reward models) to produce reward signals. Each imposes a ceiling. Human judgment cannot supervise capabilities beyond its own, proprietary APIs create dependencies, and verifiable rewards cover only domains with ground-truth answers. Self-improvement from a model's own evaluative capacity is a reward source that scales with the model itself, yet remains largely untapped by current methods. We introduce EVOLM, a post-training method that structures this capacity into explicit discriminative rubrics and uses them as training signal. EVOLM trains two capabilities within a single language model in alternation: (1) a rubric generator producing instance-specific evaluation criteria optimized for discriminative utility, which maximizes a small frozen judge's ability to distinguish preferred from dispreferred responses; and (2) a policy trained using those rubric-conditioned scores as reward. All preference signals are constructed from the policy's own outputs via temporal contrast with earlier checkpoints, requiring no human annotation or external supervision. EVOLM trains a Qwen3-8B model to generate rubrics that outperform GPT-4.1 on RewardBench-2 by 25.7%. The co-trained policy achieves 69.3% average on the OLMo3-Adapt suite, outperforming policies trained with GPT-4.1 prompted rubrics by 3.9% and with the state-of-the-art 8B reward model SkyWork-RM by 16%. Overall, EVOLM demonstrates that structuring a model's evaluative capacity into co-evolving discriminative rubrics enables self-improvement without external supervision.

AI.tldr: EVOLM是一种无需外部监督的后训练方法，利用语言模型自身的评估能力生成判别性评分标准（rubrics），通过自举方式实现模型的自我改进。核心思想是将模型的评估能力结构化为显式的判别准则，用作训练信号。
AI.motivation: 当前后训练方法依赖外部监督（人工标注、外部API或奖励模型），存在局限性：人类无法监督超越自身能力，API创建依赖性，可验证奖励仅覆盖有标准答案的领域。作者提出利用模型自身的评估能力作为奖励来源，这一"自我改进"思路尚未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: EVOLM训练单一语言模型交替执行两个能力：(1)标准生成器：产生针对具体实例的评估标准，优化以最大化冻结小判别器区分偏好与非偏好响应的能力；(2)策略模型：使用基于标准的条件分数作为奖励。所有偏好信号由策略自身输出通过时间对比构建，无需人工标注或外部监督。
AI.result: Qwen3-8B模型生成的rubrics在RewardBench-2上超越GPT-4.1达25.7%。联合训练的策略在OLMo3-Adapt套件上达69.3%平均，超越使用GPT-4.1提示的rubrics 3.9%，超越8B奖励模型SkyWork-RM达16%。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，将模型评估能力结构化为共演的判别性rubrics可实现无外部监督的自我改进，是LLM后训练的有价值新范式。

No application domain match - this deals with language model post-training while the profile focuses on motion generation from video. Different methods entirely (LLM discriminative rubrics vs diffusion models, video generation, SMPL). Does not address any pain points: extracting 3D motion from 2D video, bridging domain gap, VLM for motion quality control, or temporal consistency. title: PriorNet: Prior-Guided Engagement Estimation from Face Video
summary: Engagement estimation from face video remains challenging because facial evidence is often incomplete, labeled data are limited, and engagement annotations are subjective. We present PriorNet, a prior-guided framework that injects task-relevant priors at three stages of the pipeline: preprocessing, model adaptation, and objective design. PriorNet converts face-detection failures into explicit zero-frame placeholders so that missing-face events remain represented in the input sequence, adapts a frozen Self-supervised Video Facial Affect Perceiver (SVFAP) backbone through a Prior-guided Low-Rank Adaptation module (Prior-LoRA) for parameter-efficient specialization, and trains with a Dirichlet-evidential, uncertainty-weighted objective under hard-label supervision. We evaluate PriorNet on EngageNet, DAiSEE, DREAMS, and PAFE using each dataset's native evaluation protocol. Across these benchmarks, PriorNet improves over the strongest listed prior reference within each dataset's evaluation framing, while component ablations on EngageNet and DAiSEE indicate that the gains arise from complementary contributions of preprocessing, adaptation, and objective-level priors. These results support explicit prior injection as a useful design principle for face-video engagement estimation under the benchmark conditions studied in this work.

AI.tldr: PriorNet是一个先验引导的框架,用于从面部视频估计参与度,通过在预处理、模型适配和目标设计三个阶段注入任务相关先验来应对面部证据不完整、标注数据有限和 annotation 主观性等挑战。
AI.motivation: 从面部视频估计参与度具有挑战性,因为面部证据通常不完整,标记数据有限,且参与度注释是主观的。现有方法难以有效处理这些限制。
AI.method: PriorNet在三个阶段注入先验:1)预处理阶段将人脸检测失败转换为明确的零帧占位符,使缺失人脸事件在输入序列中得到表示;2)模型适配阶段通过先验引导的低秩适配模块(Prior-LoRA)调整冻结的自监督视频面部情感感知器(SVFAP)主干网；3)目标设计阶段使用Dirichlet证据不确定性加权目标进行硬标签监督训练。
AI.result: 在EngageNet、DAiSEE、DREAMS和PAFE数据集上使用各数据集的原生评估协议进行评估,PriorNet在每个数据集上都比最强的先验参考方法有提升。对EngageNet和DAiSEE的组件消融实验表明,性能提升来自于预处理、适配和目标层面先验的互补贡献。
AI.conclusion: 结果支持显式先验注入是face-video参与度估计的一个有用设计原则,适用于本研究中基准条件下的任务。

relevance_reason: This paper is about engagement estimation from face videos (affective computing/emotion recognition), which is a completely different application domain from 3D human motion generation in computer graphics. While both deal with video, this paper focuses on classifying/estimating user engagement levels from facial expressions, not on generating 3D motion sequences. The methods (Prior-Guided framework, Prior-LoRA for emotion perception adaptation) are specific to facial analysis and cannot be applied to motion generation tasks. The application domain mismatch is fundamental - this is video-based emotion estimation vs. 3D motion synthesis.

title: The Detector Teaches Itself: Lightweight Self-Supervised Adaptation for Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
comment: 15 pages; 4 figures; Accepted to ICPR 2026; Code is available at https://github.com/QM-IPAlab/DAT
summary: Open-vocabulary object detection aims to recognize objects from an open set of categories, which leverages vision-language models (VLMs) pre-trained on large-scale image-text data. The cooperative paradigm combines an object detector with a VLM to achieve zero-shot recognition of novel objects. However, VLMs pre-trained on full images often struggle to capture local object details, limiting their effectiveness when applied to region-level detection. We present Decoupled Adaptivity Training (DAT), a self-supervised fine-tuning approach to improve VLMs for cooperative model-based object detection. Given a cooperative model consists of a closed-set detector and a VLM, we first construct a region-aware pseudo-labeled dataset using a pre-trained closed-set object detector, in which regions corresponding to novel objects may be present but remain unlabeled or mislabeled. We then fine-tune the visual backbone of the VLM in a decoupled manner, which enhances local feature alignment while preserving global semantic knowledge via weight interpolation. DAT is a plug-and-play module that requires no inference overhead and fine-tunes less than 0.8M parameters. Experiments on the COCO and LVIS datasets show that DAT consistently improves detection performance on both novel and known categories, establishing a new state of the art in cooperative open-vocabulary detection.

AI.tldr: 开放词汇目标检测旨在识别开放类别集的目标，利用在大规模图像文本数据上预训练的视觉语言模型（VLM）。协同范式将目标检测器与VLM结合实现Novel目标的零样本识别，但全图像预训练的VLM往往难以捕捉局部目标细节，限制了其对区域级检测的有效性。提出解耦自适应训练（DAT），一种自监督微调方法，通过构建区域感知的伪标签数据集并以解耦方式微调VLM的视觉骨干，增强局部特征对齐同时通过权重插值保留全局语义知识。DAT是一个即插即用模块，无需推理开销，仅微调不到0.8M参数。在COCO和LVIS数据集上的实验表明，DAT一致地提升了Novel类别和已知类别的检测性能，建立了协同开放词汇检测的新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 开放词汇目标检测旨在识别开放类别集的目标，利用在大规模图像文本数据上预训练的视觉语言模型（VLM）。协同范式将目标检测器与VLM结合实现Novel目标的零样本识别，但全图像预训练的VLM往往难以捕捉局部目标细节，限制了其对区域级检测的有效性。

AI.result: 在COCO和LVIS数据集上的实验表明，DAT一致地提升了Novel类别和已知类别的检测性能。

title: Rethinking Temporal Consistency in Video Object-Centric Learning: From Prediction to Correspondence
summary: The de facto approach in video object-centric learning maintains temporal consistency through learned dynamics modules that predict future object representations, called slots. We demonstrate that these predictors function as expensive approximations of discrete correspondence problems. Modern self-supervised vision backbones already encode instance-discriminative features that distinguish objects reliably. Exploiting these features eliminates the need for learned temporal prediction. We introduce Grounded Correspondence, a framework that replaces learned transition functions with deterministic bipartite matching. Slots initialize from salient regions in frozen backbone features. Frame-to-frame identity is maintained through Hungarian matching on slot representations. The approach requires zero learnable parameters for temporal modeling yet achieves competitive performance on MOVi-D, MOVi-E, and YouTube-VIS. Project page: https://magenta-sherbet-85b101.netlify.app/

AI.tldr: 本文提出Grounded Correspondence框架，用确定性二分匹配取代视频目标中心学习中的学习动态模块，实现零参数时间建模，在多个数据集上取得有竞争力性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视频目标中心学习方法依赖学习到的动态模块预测未来目标表示（slots）来保持时间一致性，但这些预测器实际上是对离散对应问题的昂贵近似。现代自监督视觉backbone已能编码实例判别特征，可靠区分不同物体。
AI.method: 提出Grounded Correspondence框架：(1)Slots从frozen backbone特征中的显著区域初始化，无需学习；(2)通过Hungarian匹配在帧间维护目标身份，实现确定性二分匹配；(3)整个时间建模过程需要零可学习参数。
AI.result: 在MOVi-D、MOVi-E和YouTube-VIS数据集上实现competitive performance，证明了去除学习动态模块的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 利用预训练backbone的实例判别特征可以 Eliminating the need for learned temporal prediction，实现高效的视频目标学习，为该领域提供了新思路。
